eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Na abɔɔ ŋenaŋ ŋaageŋ ya. Mɔna abɔɔ ŋan pou nafɔ gyaŋgba mɛɛ mo ma wose lɔ ŋe dɔɔ nɛ, nɛnɛɛ mo lee me Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kagyeŋ keŋ kela abɔɔ ŋenaŋ pou dɔɔ, me te fuŋ ŋe popou leki. Lee ŋon Kristo dɔɔ kpene kamasɛ te bɔ maŋ, te mɛɛ kɛɛ ŋa ŋgba dufuŋ dɔɔ abɔɔ nɛ, na maa nyiŋ bese Kristo wui kekpaa.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: Na daa na e ke yɛɛ dokoloŋ kekpaa na me nombia ke nyiŋ tenee Wurubuarɛ siaman. Kei te yɛɛ nyi lee tom keŋ maŋ gbagba be yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ yaa keŋ mɔɔ di Wurubuarɛ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ ya. Mɔna keŋ mɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo di dɔɔ te me nombia teneewɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman ya.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Mɛɛ gyae nyi maa gyeŋ Kristo nideli, na maa naa doŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ. Na maa kpu na e naa diyem keŋ ɔ be naa nɛ, na ke yɛɛ ŋgba daa na e yeŋa la nɛ.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: Mena dɔɔ me loo gyakaa nyi de kɔŋ mena na, wee daale Wurubuarɛ waa gyuusu maŋ lee yeŋ man.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Na mɛɛ yako baa nyi me taŋ ke nyiŋ mena abɔɔ kɛŋa pou, yaa me gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman kekpaa ya. Mɔna mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ bo nyi maa nyiŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ Yesu Kristo be baake maŋ nyi me kaa bese ɔ wui nɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: Me tebia, na mɛɛ yako baa nyi me taŋ ke nyiŋ kpene keŋ mee yoo nyi maa nyiŋ nɛ ya. Mɔna nombii dokoloŋ keŋ mɛɛ yɛɛ yɛna nyiaa, mee wolee abɔɔ ŋan pou be kaa lam nɛ. Mɔɔ na tekaa tɔɔse ŋa bela ya. Mɔna kpene keŋ doo me siaman nɛ, ke dɔɔ te me loo gyakaa.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Akpaa balaŋ na peree keyeu man na, bɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ yeu kelii botɔɔ keŋ kaboena nyi baa lii nɛ pɛna baa nyiŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ bɛɛ peree nɛ. Mena ke mɔ yaa me gyakaa mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ me kaa lii ɔto, na Wurubuarɛ ke nyiŋ fa maŋ kpene keŋ ɔ be yako see nyi waa mo tɔ maŋ kom nɛ. Kom keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa tɔ maŋ yɛna nyi, keŋ mɔɔ lɛɛ ɔ bu Yesu Kristo di dɔɔ waa yela maa nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyu ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ man.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Daa baŋ pou dɔɔ bee Wurubuarɛ ɔsom keŋ man nɛ, mena dinɔɔ kei te kaboena nyi de popou dee nyiŋ. Mɔna akpaa ɛ man baale dana agyueŋ kpoo daale na, Wurubuarɛ waa kyɔ ŋon na ɛ ke nyii me nombia kɛŋa man nideli.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Kpene keŋ ne hia yɛna nyi, ɛ yela dɛɛ kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ be wulaa yako nyi dɛɛ kyaa nɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: Me tebia, ɛ popou ɛ kasee ma kekyaabii ŋgba mena keŋ baale ne yɛɛ nɛ. Ɛ see ɛ sia tɛɛle man, na ɛ ke kasee balaŋ baŋ ba kekyaabii yɛɛ ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Me te wulaa yako ŋon nombii kei. Te nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ mo siasaraŋ mɛɛ yako ŋon bela nyiaa, balaŋ baale ta besena ba wose Kristo kɔlala. Be nombia ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ nawolo nyi baŋ gyaŋ na, Kristo yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem nɛ be dana tɔnɔɔ ya.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Wurubuarɛ waa wɔlɛɛ mena balaŋ benaŋ kekpaakekpaa. Nawolo nyi be ta mo abɔɔ ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae nɛ besena be Wurubuarɛ. Kpene keŋ yɛɛ desɛŋ nombia ŋa nɛ, ŋan man te baŋ ne gyɔ be konɔɔ. Tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae kaageŋ te baŋ na gyueŋ.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mɔna daa dɔɔ de dɛɛ yɛna Wurubuarɛ man adido. Botɔɔ te de loo gyakaa nideli nyi da nyeelɛɛre ŋon waa lee kɔŋ. Ŋon yɛna de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Debaŋ keŋ waa kɔŋ nɛ, ŋon ne gyae la waa mo doŋ keŋ ɔ dana ɔ ne gyee kpene kamasɛ nɛ kyɛɛkee da wosenaane kei keŋ gyae ka yeŋ nɛ, na waa besena ke na ka ke yɛɛ ŋgba ŋon gbagba ɔ wui gyoorobiiri wosenaane keŋ nɛ.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Lee mena dɔɔ me tebia gyaagyi baŋ mɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia te ɛ nombia ne gyɔ maŋ loo, ɛ seŋ keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke di de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan dɔɔ. Ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ te maa di gyoŋ na maa nyiŋ yele.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: Ewodia na Sintike, mɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyi ɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ nawolo nyi ɛ popou yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo balaŋwɔ.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Nɛnɛɛ nyaŋ me dɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋon mɛɛ mo ma wose lɔ n dɔɔ, mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke desina ala bala kɛwɔ nsana. Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ mee kolosi Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan nɛ, ba seŋawɔ na maŋ demena na dunoluŋ pou. Mena ala kɛwɔ na Kelemente na me dɔɔna akaŋ baŋ pou kyɔɔ maŋ nideli ma tom keŋ keyɛɛ man. Ba te ŋmarase mena balaŋ kɛwɔ pou yela do nyeedoŋ kekpaa tɔne keŋ man.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ na, ɛ yela ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ lee kpene keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu be yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ. Mɛɛ yako ŋon baa bela nyiaa, ɛ yela ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Ɛ yela balaŋ pou kena ɛ wose keyɔkɔse na ɛ dinɔɔ kpaakpaate keŋ. Nawolo nyi be gyae ke kyare ya, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa bese kɔŋ.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Ɛ na barase na kolo ke yɛɛ ya. Mɔna kpene kamasɛ man na, ɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ na ɛ ke fa e karaŋ lee nombii kamasɛ man, na ɛ ka mo ɛ nombia ŋan pou doo ɛ konɔɔ man nɛ see ɔ siaman.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, keŋ ɛ ne lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ keŋ walaŋ bɛɛ tale nyii ke man ya nɛ, gyae ke yela ɛ wɔe ke fɛɛ ŋon na ɛ konɔɔ man nombia mɔ ke kyaa ŋon kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: Me tebia, kpene keŋ be kaa maa yako ŋon yɛna nyiaa, ɛ mo ya agyueŋ gyakaa nombia ŋan ŋe yɛɛ anokoare, na kpene keŋ ke dana obuo, na nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ, na kpene keŋ dukum be doo ke man ya, na kpene keŋ na wola balaŋ kegyae, na kpene keŋ ke dana yele kpaakpaa nɛ dɔɔ. Akpaa nyi kolo kyaa keŋ ke dei keŋ balaŋ ne kɛlɛɛ ke na, kaboena nyi yaa gyueŋ mena abɔɔ ŋenaŋ dɔɔ bo.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Abɔɔ ŋan mɔɔ wola ŋon te ɛ be lɛɛ ŋa do, na ŋan ɛ be naa me man na ŋan ɛ be nyii mɔɔ kolosi nɛ, ŋan te kaboena nyi yaa yɛɛ. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ waa kyaa na ŋon.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Dana maŋ gyoŋ te mɛɛ lese de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele, nawolo nyi nɛnɛɛ ɛ ta bese lese wola nyi me nombia ne hia ŋon. Ma gyeŋ nyi me nombia wulaa ne hia ŋon, mɔna gbɛɛ te ɛ te nyim na ɛ ka lese wola ya.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Na ma wose kyaŋa na maŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa ya. Nawolo nyi maŋ dɔɔ, me te wulaa kasee mena keŋ maa kyaa gyoŋ man lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: Ma gyeŋ diyem man kekyaa, te ma gyeŋ wosekenyiŋ man mɔ kekyaa. Kpene kamasɛ man na, ma gyeŋ ma wose katela. Me dii baa bo o, yaa tanam na koo na maŋ bo o, me dana o mɔɔ dana ya o, ma gyeŋ ma wose katela.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Nawolo nyi Kristo doŋ keŋ doo me man dɔɔ, maa tale yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Mɔna ɛ yɛɛ ke nideli ŋgba ma wose be kyaŋ maŋ te ɛ be kyɔ maŋ nɛ.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Ɛmɛɛ Filipitena gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyiaa, debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ fiasɛɛ mee kolosi Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa ŋon te mɔɔ lee Masedonia tɛɛle man nɛ, lee ɛmɛɛ wɔle na Kristotena baŋ ŋolo na ŋolo te kyɔ maŋ na kolo ya.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ gba me kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man te ma wose be kyaŋ maŋ nɛ, ɛ yelee maŋ abɔɔ agbaatee agbaatee.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Na me sia ne yɛɛ bo nyi yaa yelee maŋ abɔɔ ya. Mɔna kpene keŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ lɛɛ ya abɔɔ yɛna nyi, mɛɛ gyae nyi Wurubuarɛ ke hiraa ŋon lee ɛ deeli keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ man.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nyiaa, abɔɔ ŋan pou ɛ ba mo yelee maŋ nɛ kaa tuŋa maŋ te ŋan mɔ yɛna abɔɔ ŋan ne hia maŋ. Abɔɔ ŋan ɛ ba mo yelee Epaferadituse ba mo kɔna maŋ nɛ, te yeli me ta bese nyiŋ gbaa. Ya abɔɔ ŋenaŋ yɛɛ ŋgba abɔɔ ofoŋ nyiŋan ŋan ɛ ba mo kaa deesi fa Wurubuarɛ nɛ. Ŋe yɛɛ kedeesa abɔɔ ŋan ŋe kaboena, mena dɔɔ ŋa gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Me Wurubuarɛ ŋon mɛɛ som e nɛ, waa fa ŋon abɔɔ ŋan pou kaboena nyi yaa nyiŋ ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man abɔɔ boe nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ te kaa bese Yesu Kristo balaŋ.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Ɛ yela dɛɛ lese de kya Wurubuarɛ yele kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Ɛ do Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa botɔɔ nɛ nɔɔ. Me tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa me gyaŋ kɛbo bɛɛ kyɔ maŋ nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa kɛbo nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Tuturu na, baŋ be kyaa gyoo dinaa Kaesa dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon Wurubuarɛ ba lese maŋ lee ɔ kegyaebii man nyi maa yɛɛ Yesu Kristo kpilale nɛ, na de dɔɔ Kristobaale Timoti gyaŋ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ de tebia Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di, te ɛ silana anokoare keŋ te ɛ kyaa Kolose donɔɔ man nɛ. De kya Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ dɛɛ fane na dɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ɔ kya ŋon karaŋ lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Nawolo nyi de te nyii mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di, na mena keŋ ɛ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou nɛ.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Ɛ ne yɛɛ kɛŋa pou nawolo nyi, ɛ sia gyakaa abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan Wurubuarɛ be desina see ŋon adido nɛ dɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɛ be taŋgbɛɛ nyii nɛ, yele la te ɛ gyeŋawɔ nyi abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋaale doo adido fa ŋon. Wurubuarɛ nombia kɛŋa yɛna anokoare nombia ŋan.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Nombia kpaakpaa ŋan bɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ te lɛɛ tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ. Te ŋa te yeli balaŋ burum ne kyɛɛkee lee be gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ man kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ ŋa be kyɛɛkee ŋon lee wee gyaŋgbate keŋ ɛ be nyii nombia ŋenaŋ, te ɛ be nyii Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ man nideli nɛ.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: De dɔɔ gyaagyi Epafirase ŋon ɔ yɛɛ Yesu Kristo tobaale e te ɔ ne yɛɛ ɔ tom na anokoare, te daa na e pou ne yɛɛ tom dokoloŋ nɛ yako na ŋon bɛrɛɛ nombia kɛŋa. Ŋon kaa seŋala de nawɔɔ man te ɔ kyɔɔ ŋon.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Ŋon mɔ kaa yako na daa mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon be yeli ɛ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ balaŋ nideli nɛ.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Mena dɔɔ lee wee keŋ dɔɔ nyii ɛ wose man nombia nɛ, dɛɛ fane fa ŋon wee kamasɛ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa fa ŋon nyansa na waa yela ɛ ka gyeŋ ɔ kegyaebii na ɛ ke nyii ɔ nombia ŋan pou man nideli.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Kei ne gyae la ke yela ɛ ke tale kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ, na ɛ ke yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan kaboena nɛ gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, na ɛ ka gyeŋ ɔ nombia ŋan mɔ kpu.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Dɛɛ fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ gyoorobiiri doŋ keŋ ka dokoso be kyaa ya nɛ do ɛ man, na waa yela ɛ kenyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ kpene kamasɛ keŋ gyae ke kɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ nɛ man.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Dɛɛ fane nyi gyoŋ dee doo ɛ man na ɛ ke fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi ŋon yele la te ɛ kaboewɔ nyi yaa nyiŋ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan ɔ be desina see ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ man fa ɔ balaŋ nɛ.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Nawolo nyi ŋon Wurubuarɛ lese na daa lee ɔbɔnsam ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ man, te ɔ moo daa kɔŋ ɔ bu Yesu ŋon ɔ ne gyae ɔ nombia nɛ gyoorobiiri man.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Ɔ bu Yesu Kristo kei te ɔ moowɔ tɔ de nombiakumɛɛ pou kom. Ŋon Yesu yele la te de nyiŋa da wose te Wurubuarɛ moo de nombiakumɛɛ pou kyɛɛ daa.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Wurubuarɛ bu Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ kyaa pɛte Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ nɛ, ŋon yɛna Wurubuarɛ ŋon walaŋ bɛɛ mo ɔ sibii naa e ya nɛ dinɔɔ. Ŋon kela na abɔɔ ŋan pou Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Ŋon Yesu dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ abɔɔ pou. Abɔɔ ŋan ŋe kyaa adido na ŋan ŋe kyaa tɛɛle man, ŋan dɛɛ mo de sia fonɛɛ naa ŋa na ŋan de bɛɛ naa ŋa ya nɛ, mo kpu na kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ yenaŋ kamasɛ ŋgba gbeŋgyoona na gyooneŋ pou. Ŋon Yesu dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ abɔɔ pou, te ŋe popou mɔ kyae fa e.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Ŋon Yesu Kristo kei wulaa ɔ kyaa pɛte Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, te ɔ doŋ man dɔɔ te kpene kamasɛ mɔ kyaa.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Ŋon yɛna ɔ balaŋ Kristotena dikpii keŋ pou nyee, te ɔ na wola wɔ gbɛɛ ŋgba mena keŋ deniwalaŋ nyee na wola na ɔ wose pou gbɛɛ nɛ. Ŋon ke yɛna be nyeedoŋ pou nyee, na walaŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ be taŋgbɛɛ gyuusu lee yeŋ man, na ke yela waa bese abɔɔ pou man siamante.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Ke yɛɛ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba kegyaebii ke nyi, ɔ dinɔɔ pou de kaa doo ɔ bu ŋon man.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Yesu yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ na ɔ fatabo keŋ be kyɛɛkee leki nɛ, keŋ kaa desina na kpene kamasɛ na Wurubuarɛ nsana. Keŋ moona wosefɛɛreŋ kɔŋ adido na ateta abɔɔ pou na ŋon Wurubuarɛ nsana.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nafɔ ɛmɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ nsana be dana gyoŋ ya, te ɛ nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ kɔla e lee ɛ konɔɔse man.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Kristo ŋon ɔ be kaa bese deniwalaŋ te ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ desina ɛmɛɛ na ŋon Wurubuarɛ nsana. Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kei na ɛ ke tale kaa seŋ ɔ siaman keŋ dukum kamasɛ be doo ɛ man na ke yela waa bu ŋon fɔɔ ya.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Mɔna kaboena nyi yaa seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ, keŋ nyi ɛ ba lese ɛ loo lee abɔɔ ŋan Wurubuarɛ be yako see ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan man nyi waa yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ ya. Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɛ be wulaa nyii nɛ, ŋan ke te be dɔŋɛɛ bee kolosi fa balaŋ yenaŋ kamasɛ. Wurubuarɛ yele la te maŋ Pɔɔl mɔ kaa bese nombia ŋenaŋ tomyɛɛre te me dɔŋ mee kolosi ŋa fa balaŋ nɛ.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Dana maŋ gyoŋ ŋgba ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ mɛɛ naa diyem debaŋ kei nɛ. Kei nawolo nyi mena keŋ Yesu be naa diyem ɔ balaŋ dɔɔ nɛ, mena diyem kenaŋ ke yaa ma seŋɛɛ ɔ nawɔɔ man mɛɛ naa ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi Kristo walaŋ waa naa diyem Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ nɛ.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Wurubuarɛ gbagba lese na maŋ nyi maa bese Kristotena pou tobaale. Tom keŋ ɔ ba mo do me nyiŋmaa man yɛna nyi maa lese ŋon Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan man pou wola ŋon.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Gyaŋgba keŋ na Wurubuarɛ moo nombia kɛŋa weese beneŋtena baŋ, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ ta lese ŋa debɔɔ wola ɔ balaŋ Kristotena baŋ.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Ke yɛɛ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba kegyaebii ke nyi waa lese ɔ nombia aweeseŋ ŋan ŋe yɛɛ nombia dinaana ŋa, te ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ nɛ wola ɔ balaŋ pou. Nombia ŋenaŋ yɛna nyi, keŋ Kristo doo ɛ konɔɔse man dɔɔ ɛ loo gyakaa nyi wee daale ɛ ka bese gyoorobia.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Mena dɔɔ te dee kolosi Yesu Kristo kei wose man nombia fa walaŋ kamasɛ nɛ. Dɛɛ mo de nyansa keŋ pou de dana nɛ wola walaŋ kamasɛ Yesu Kristo nombia ŋan te dɛɛ mo faree wɔ, na ke yela baa lɛɛ nombia ŋan di na baa seŋ ŋe man keŋkeŋ, na wee daale baa tale seŋ Wurubuarɛ siaman keŋ dukum kamasɛ be doo be man ya.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Kei dɔɔ te me yase me sia mɛɛ mo Kristo doŋ keŋ ɔ ba mo do me man nɛ mo yɛɛ ɔ tom keŋ nɛ.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ mena keŋ mɛɛ ko ma wose Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man, na baŋ pou ba te naa ta maŋ see ya nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Kpene keŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ yɛɛ mena yɛna nyi, mɛɛ gyae nyi maa do ŋon kakyeŋ na ɛ ka seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man nideli na ɛ ke gyae dɔŋa na ɛ ke yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ. Kei gyae ke yela ɛ ke nyiŋ nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan nafɔ ŋa weesɛɛ nɛ man nideli, na ɛ ke nyiŋ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan pou na lee Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋenaŋ man nɛ. Yesu Kristo gbagba yɛna nombii aweeseŋ kei, te mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ e nideli.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: Wurubuarɛ ta mo ɔ nyansa na ɔ nombia man kagyeŋ pou weese Yesu Kristo man, na dee nyiŋ ta ŋon Yesu dɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ nɛ man nideli.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: Mee wulaa yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa pou baa, na ŋolo be nyiŋ mo nɔɔman yeliŋ mo nombia wɔlɛɛ ŋaale kaa beo ŋon ya.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Doo nyi maŋ gbagba be kyaa ɛ gyaŋ botɔɔ koraŋ ya nɛ, me konɔɔ man na ma gyeŋ nyi me kpuɛ na ŋon. Mena dɔɔ me ke nyii nyi ɛ ne yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ ke gbɛɛ dɔɔ, na mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Kristo di te ɛ seŋɛɛ nombia ŋan man keŋkeŋ nɛ yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ nideli.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Mena dɔɔ mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di nyi ŋon yɛna ɛ gbeŋgyoo nɛ, ɛ betaa kyaa na e mena.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Ɛ mo ɛ wose teeli na e na ɛ ke kasee ɔ nombia kpu, na ɛ ka seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ wulaa wola ŋon nɛ, na ɛ ka do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ nideli debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Ɛ kɛɛ ɛ wose dɔɔ nideli na ŋolo be nyiŋ mo tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ kaa beo ŋon ya. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ yɛɛ denibalaŋ beneŋ nombia na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombia ayɛɛsa ŋa. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ bɛɛ wola kolo lee Kristo wose man ya.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Ɛ na yeli baa beo ŋon ya, nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ Yesu Kristo be kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ koraŋ na, Wurubuarɛ dinɔɔ na ɔ doŋ pou doo bo ɔ man.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: Nɛnɛɛ keŋ ɛmɛɛ na Kristo be kaa yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, ɛ te nyiŋ ɔ dinɔɔ keŋ pou. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi Kristo yɛna kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ nɛ nyee.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Lee mena keŋ ɛmɛɛ na Kristo be yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɔ kara ɛ baala wose baa te ɛ kaa bese ɔ balaŋ nɛ. Mena baala wose kekara kei, te yɛɛ denibalaŋ wui keŋ bɛɛ mo nyiŋmaase kara nɛ ya. Mɔna baala wose kekara kei yɛɛ kpene keŋ ɔ ba mo lese ŋon lee ɛ nombiakumɛɛ man.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Ba ke sɔ ŋon Wurubuarɛ loŋ keŋ nɛ, yɛɛ yaa ŋgba be wuu ŋon baa na Kristo te ba besewɔ gyuusu ɛmɛɛ na e nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ te lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ba mo ɔ doŋ dinaa gyuusu Kristo lee yeŋ man nɛ di.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nafɔ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ yem nɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman, lee ɛ nombiakumɛɛ na mena keŋ ɛ be bɛɛ nyi ɛ be di Wurubuarɛ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ. Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ɛ ke lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di dɔɔ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ ta mo ɛ nombiakumɛɛ kyɛɛ ŋon te ɔ faa ŋon nyeedoŋ wɔle, ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ be gyuusu Yesu Kristo lee yeŋ man te ɔ be fa e nyeedoŋ nɛ.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Ɛ yela dɛɛ mo kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ fa daa nɛ maa na nombii kei. Yɛɛ yaa ŋgba Wurubuarɛ te ŋmarase de nombiakumɛɛ ŋan pou dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ see, te ɔ buu daa fɔɔ nyi waa wɔŋ da deŋele nawolo nyi de bee di ɔ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ ya nɛ. Mɔna ɔ ta feefo mena abɔɔ ŋan ɔ be ŋmarase see nɛ pou lee tɔne keŋ man. Mena dɔɔ Kristo ka yeŋ ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ dɔɔ nɛ, yɛɛ yaa ŋgba Wurubuarɛ moo tɔne kenaŋ baa mataa ɔpaŋdaŋ kenaŋ dɔɔ gyɔ ke wɔlɛɛ nɛ.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Yesu Kristo yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ yɔkɔse feliŋkumɛɛ, na kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ nɛ. Ɔ yɛɛ kɛŋa pou do wɔ desɛŋ na walaŋ kamasɛ ke nyiŋ naa nyi, Yesu Kristo te di doŋ feliŋkumɛɛ ŋan pou dɔɔ.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na yeli ŋolo ke bu ŋon fɔɔ lee mmaraase ŋan ŋɛɛ tɔ ɛ kedi na ɛ kenyɔɔ gbɛɛ, yaa ɛ weeya dinaana kedi yaa gyaalaŋ wɔle weeya kedi yaa ɛ kefɛɛfoweeya kedi mmaraase dɔɔ ya.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa pou doe, na kawola nyi abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋaale dɔŋ wɔle ne kɔŋ. Te nombia kɛŋa pou seŋɛɛ bo fa Kristo.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na fa walaŋ kamasɛ gbɛɛ na waa beo ŋon, na waa lese ŋon lee ɛ gbɛɛ man kɔŋ ŋon wui gbɛɛ kum man nyi ɛ kaa sila e ya. Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ na wola la nyi yaa som Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ be kyaa adido nɛ. Ɔ na beo yɔkɔse ɔ wose nideli ɔsom man, te ɔ ne yako nyi Wurubuarɛ ta lese nombia ŋaale wola e. Mena dɔɔ ɔ ne kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ɔ yɛɛ walaŋ dibiliŋ ŋolo e, mɔna ɔ konɔɔ man nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ gyakaa Wurubuarɛ nombia dɔɔ ya nɛ, na beo na e te ɔ na wola ɔ wose mena nɛ. Ke gbagba mɔ na ɔ be dana kpene keŋ dɔɔ kaboena nyi waa seŋ na waa wola ɔ wose ya.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ te tira ɔ wose lee Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ ɔ balaŋ pou nyee e nɛ man. Kristo man kedoo ne yele la te baŋ be silana e nɛ ne nyiŋ doŋ te bɛɛ bee ba kelɛɛdi man ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ. Kristo yɛɛ ŋgba deniwalaŋ nyee nɛ te ɔ balaŋ mɔ yɛɛ ŋgba ɔ wose nɛ. Mena keŋ deniwalaŋ wose man abɔɔ ne kyaŋ wosenaane keŋ towaa te kɛɛ bee nɛ, mena ke te Kristo mɔ ne fa Kristotena pou doŋ te bɛɛ bee yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Kristo ka yeŋ ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ dɔɔ nɛ yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɛmɛɛ na e yeŋala nɛ, mena dɔɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ ba tekaa taŋ doŋ ɛ dɔɔ bela ya. Lee mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi yaa sila tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ ŋgba mena keŋ balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ ya.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Ba abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ ŋenaŋ ŋaale yɛna nyi, Ɛ na mo ɛ nyiŋmaa kyaŋ kpene kei ya. Ɛ na daa kpene kei kɛɛ ya. Ɛ na tina kpene kei ya.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa pou gyae kaa kyom, nawolo nyi ŋe yɛɛ ŋan denibalaŋ gbagba be bake see te bɛɛ wola balaŋ nyi baa di ŋe dɔɔ.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Balaŋ burum na gyueŋ nyi mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa kesila yɛɛ nyansa nombia ŋa, mɔna nyansa kamasɛ be doo ŋe man ya. Balaŋ baŋ bee sila mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa nɛ, ne naa na sia naase ba wose diyem yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋaale na kawola nyi bɛɛ som Wurubuarɛ nideli. Bɛɛ beo yɔkɔse ba wose te bɛɛ naase ba wose diyem, mɔna mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa dɔɔ kedi nɛ, bee yeli baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ nyi bɔɔ yɛɛ dukum bela ya.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Wurubuarɛ ke gyuusu Kristo lee yeŋ man nɛ, yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɛmɛɛ na e yaa ɔ gyuusuwɔ lee yeŋ man nɛ, nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ na Kristo te yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Mena dɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ mo ɛ loo gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan kyaa adido nɛ dɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ te gyina Kristo adido te ɔ moo e ka see ŋon Wurubuarɛ dunoluŋ dɔɔ adido botɔɔ nyi waa di gyoori kpu na e.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ mo ya agyueŋ pou gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan kyaa adido nɛ dɔɔ. Ɛ na mo ya agyueŋ gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ ya.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Nawolo nyi yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɛ ta yem te ɛ nyeedoŋ weesɛɛ Kristo man Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ nɛ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Akpaa Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ ɛ nyeedoŋ gbagba e nɛ de bɛɛ lee adido kɔŋ na, ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ ke kpu na e ɔ gyoorobiiri dinaa keŋ man.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombiakumɛɛ pou keyɛɛ man. Ɛ tina nombiakumɛɛ ŋgba kafoŋ na ayimɛɛ ka mo wuu wose na lookum na agyueŋ kum yela. Ɛ na yɛɛ kedikum ya nawolo nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ kedikum na, ŋon na bane somra yɛɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Ɛ tina nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou keyɛɛ yela, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ yɛɛ mena nombiakumɛɛ ŋenaŋ nɛ deŋele.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi gyaŋgba ɛ kekyaabii man pɛte ɛ be kaa lɛɛ Kristo di na, ɛmɛɛ mɔ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ kaboena nyi yaa wɔŋ ɛ wose lee mena nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou man. Ɛ tina baŋ kagyeŋ, na baŋ kum na balaŋ katee na balaŋ yela kewɔlɛɛ na nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ kekolosi yela.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Ɛ na dii akɛrɛɛ fa dɔŋa ya, nawolo nyi ɛ te tina ɛ dinɔɔ bene na ka abɔɔ kumɛɛ ŋan pou yela.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: Nɛnɛɛ keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ, te yɛɛ ŋgba ɛ ta bese balaŋ wɔlɛɛ nɛ. Wurubuarɛ yele la te ɛ nyiŋa dinɔɔ wɔlɛɛ kei, na ɛ ke nyiŋ kyɛɛkee yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋgba ŋon nɛ. Ɔ na wola ŋon nyi ya agyueŋ na ya abɔɔ ayɛɛsa pou dɛɛ yɛɛ ŋgba ŋon nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyeŋ e nideli.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Nɛnɛɛ Wurubuarɛ te yɛɛ ŋon balaŋ wɔlɛɛ Kristo man. Mena dɔɔ be famenɛ nyi ŋolo yɛɛ Giriki baale e yaa Gyuda baale e ya. Be famenɛ nyi ŋolo kara ɔ baala wose yaa ɔ te kare ya. Be famenɛ nyi ŋolo yɛɛ siakaralate e yaa ɔ yɛɛ diyiŋte e ya. Be famenɛ nyi ŋolo yɛɛ donɔɔte bu e yaa ɔ yɛɛ ŋɔɔle e ya. Be famenɛ nyi ŋolo yɛɛ gbeŋi e yaa ɔ yɛɛ gyoorobu e ya. Mɔna kpene keŋ ne hia yɛna nyi Kristo yɛna de popou nyee, te ŋon doo la balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ lɛɛ e di nɛ konɔɔse man.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ŋon nideli mena dɔɔ te ɔ lese ŋon nyi yaa yɛɛ ɔ balaŋ baŋ nombiikum kamasɛ be doo be man ya. Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou ke kaboena ŋon Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii. Ɛ wii dɔŋa waraŋase, na ɛ ke yɛɛ deeli na ɛ ke yɔkɔse ɛ wose, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ fa dɔŋa, na ɛ ke yela ɛ sia kedoo tɛɛle man.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Ɛ na mo dɔŋa nombia do ɛ tɔɔse man ya. Akpaa ŋolo de yɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ nombiikum na, waa mo kyɛɛ e. Kaboena nyi yaa mo nombiakumɛɛ kyɛɛ dɔŋa, ŋgba mena keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo mɔ ba mo ɛ nombiakumɛɛ kyɛɛ ŋon nɛ.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Nombia kɛŋa pou wɔle na, ɛ mo balaŋ kegyae tɔ nɔɔ. Nawolo nyi balaŋ kegyae ne yele la te balaŋ ne tale yilaa kyaa debodokoloŋ te bɛɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Kristo baake ŋon bo nyi yaa kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man na dɔŋa, mena dɔɔ ɛ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ke tale nɛ, na ɛ ke kyaa na dɔŋa wosefɛɛreŋ man. Nawolo nyi ɛ popou yɛɛ walaŋ dokoloŋ. Wurubuarɛ lese na ŋon nyi yaa yɛɛ ɔ balaŋ, mena dɔɔ te ɔ ne gyae nyi ɛmɛɛ na ɛ tebia pou yaa kyaa na dɔŋa, na debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ne fane fa ŋon Wurubuarɛ karaŋ.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Ɛ yela Kristo nombia ŋan ke doo ɛ man nideli. Ɛ mo nyansa wola dɔŋa nombia ŋenaŋ na ɛ ke faree wɔ nyi be na yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ ya. Ɛ kpee Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nɔɔneŋ kpookpoo do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ gyoŋ man lee ɛ konɔɔse man.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ yaa keŋ ɛ keyako na, ɛ yɛɛ ŋe popou lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man. Na ɛ ke ta ɔ dɔɔ do de kya Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Ɛmɛɛ ala yalala, ɛ yɔkɔse ɛ wose fa ɛ baala ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi Kristo walaŋ waa yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Ɛmɛɛ baala yalala mɔ, ɛ gyae ɛ wɛɛla nombia. Ɛ na ŋmanyaŋ wɔ ya.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Ɛmɛɛ bia mɔ, ɛ nyii ɛ lolala dei kpene kamasɛ man. Nawolo nyi mena te de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ne gyae nyi yaa yɛɛ.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Ɛmɛɛ lolala, ɛ na yɛɛ ɛ bia akpanyaŋnyaŋ ya. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na, ba wose gyae ke yɔkɔse wɔ.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ yɛɛ gbeŋawɔ nɛ, ɛ mo obuo fa ɛ gbeŋgyoona tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gbɛɛ kamasɛ man. Ɛ na bu wɔ be siaman kaageŋ keŋ ɛ ne gyae nyi baa kɛlɛɛ ŋon dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɛ bu wɔ lee ɛ konɔɔ man nawolo nyi ɛ ne yee Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ na, ɛ yɛɛ ke lee ɛ konɔɔ man ŋgba ɛ ne yɛɛ ke fa de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ nɛ. Ɛ na kɛɛ nyi deniwalaŋ te ɛ ne yɛɛ ɛ ke fa ya.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Ɛ yɛɛ ɛ tom nideli nawolo nyi ɛ gyeŋ nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa tɔ ŋon kom nideli. Waa tɔ ŋon kom keŋ ɔ be yako see nyi waa fa ɔ balaŋ nɛ. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi Kristo yɛna walaŋ ŋon ɛ ne yɛɛ tom fa.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ nombiikum na, Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ ɔtenate deŋele ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nombiikum keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ nɛ. Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia na, ɔ bɛɛ kɛɛ walaŋ siaman ya.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ dana gbeŋa nɛ, ɛ tela wɔ nideli na ɛ ke fa wɔ kpene kamasɛ keŋ kaboena nyi yaa fa wɔ nɛ. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ dana gbeŋgyoo ŋolo ŋon ɔ kyaa adido, te ɔ ne naa kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Ɛ yase ɛ sia fane debaŋ kamasɛ. Akpaa ɛ ne fane na, ɛ mo ya agyueŋ pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ na ɛ ke fa e karaŋ.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Ɛ fane fa daa mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa toro gbɛɛ fa daa, na dee nyiŋ kolosi ɔ nombia ŋan nafɔ ŋa weesɛɛ nɛ fa balaŋ. Wurubuarɛ nombia kɛŋa keyako dɔɔ te be kyaŋa maŋ tɔ deni nɛ.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Ɛ fane nyi maa tale lese nombia ŋan man wola balaŋ nideli ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi maa yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Akpaa ɛmɛɛ na balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ kyaa na, ɛ kyaa na wɔ nyansa man. Ɛ kɛɛ nideli nyi akpaa ɛ nyiŋ gbɛɛ kyomii keŋ ɛ ka mo kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia fa wɔ na, ɛ na yeli ka ke laŋ ŋon ya.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Ɛ ne kolosi fa wɔ na, ɛ yela ɛ nɔɔwoya keyɛɛ gyoŋ na ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na baa nyiŋ tei ŋon. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena te ŋolo de bɔɔse ŋon kolo lee ɛ Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ man na, ɛ ka gyeŋ mena keŋ ɛ ke tiranɔɔ fa e.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: De dɔɔ gyaagyi Tikikuse ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ ɔ tom anokoare man te ɔ kpuɛ na maŋ te dɛɛ yɛɛ Kristo tom kei nɛ de kɔŋ na, waa kaa yako ŋon ma kekyaabii man nombia pou.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Mena dɔɔ te mee kpila e ɛ gyaŋ na ɔ kaa yako ŋon da kekyaabii man nombia na waa do ŋon kakyeŋ.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Ŋon na de dɔɔ Onesimuse ŋon dɛɛ gyae ɔ nombia nideli, te ɔ ne di anokoare fa Kristo te ɔ yɛɛ ɛ man ŋolo e nɛ ne kɔŋala. Baŋ ne gyae la be kaa yako ŋon de kɛbo nombia na da kekyaabii man pou.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Arisitakuse ŋon bɔɔ kyaŋ daa na e tɔ deni nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Mena mɔ te Banabase ɔ naabu Maake mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Me taŋ wulaa yako ŋon Maake kei wose man nombia, mena dɔɔ akpaa ɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ botɔɔ na ɛ lɛɛ e nideli.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Gyosua ŋon bɛɛ bese baake e Gyustuse nɛ mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Mena balaŋ batooro kɛwɔ baageŋ yɛna Gyudatena baŋ be kpuɛ na maŋ te dee kolosi Wurubuarɛ gyoorobiiri keŋ nombia. Ba te yeli me wɔe te fɛɛ maŋ nideli.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Ɛ dɛɛ baale Epafirase ŋon ɔ na som Yesu Kristo nideli nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Debaŋ kamasɛ na ɔ ne yase ɔ sia fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyi waa yela ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man, na ɛ ka bee nideli Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan kagyeŋ man na ɛ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Maa tale gyɔ me konɔɔ yako nyi ɔ na yeŋ ɛ yeŋ. Mena ke te ɔ na yeŋ Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia na Hirapolise donɔɔse man mɔ nɛ yeŋ.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: De dɔɔ gyaagyi Luka ŋon ɔ yɛɛ dɔketa e nɛ, na Demase mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ɛ do de tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man nɛ, na de deesi Nimfa na baŋ bɛɛ gyaŋee ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Akpaa be kala tɔne kei fa ŋon na, ɛ mo ke yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man nɛ, na baŋ mɔ ke kala ke, na ɛmɛɛ mɔ ke lɛɛ keŋ mɔɔ ŋmarase yelee wɔ nɛ kala.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Ɛ yako Akipuse nyi waa yɛɛ kakyeŋ na waa kɛɛ nyi ɔ te tɔɔle tom keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ba mo do ɔ nyiŋmaa man nɛ pou.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Maŋ Pɔɔl gbagba moona me nyiŋmaa ŋmarase nɔɔkado ɔtomante kei nɛ. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi me doo deni man, na ɛ ke fane fa maŋ. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl na Silase na Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man, te ɛ ba mo ɛ wose fa de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nɛ. De kya Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ dɛɛ fane na, dɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee ɛ dɔɔ.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ dɛɛ fane na, de gyakaa dɛɛ tɔɔse mena keŋ ɛ na mo ɛ kelɛɛdi yɛɛ tom. Dɛɛ tɔɔse ɛ kakyeŋ keŋ ɛ na doo lee ɛ balaŋ kegyae, na mena keŋ ɛ ne kyaŋ ɛ wose seŋ keŋkeŋ lee ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ ne yeli ɛ na mo ɛ loo gyakaa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ nɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: De tebia, da gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ŋon te ɔ lese ŋon nyi yaa bese ɔ balaŋ.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ dɔɔ kɔŋ kaa yako ŋon Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan nɛ, na kekolosi kaageŋ te de kɔŋawɔ kaa kolosi fa ŋon ya. Mɔna de yela ɛ naa Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon doŋ keŋ. Te de yela ɛ gyeŋawɔ nyi daa gbagba te lɛɛ di nyi nombia ŋan dee kolosi nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ. Ɛ gyeŋ abɔɔ ŋan pou dɔɔ yɛɛ debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ deeli dɔɔ te de yɛɛ mena abɔɔ ŋenaŋ pou.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Ɛ kasee daa na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ. Mena dɔɔ ɛ kayeyɛɛ man koraŋ na, ɛ moo gyoŋ keŋ ba lee Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon gyaŋ nɛ lɛɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Lee mena dɔɔ te yeli Kristotena baŋ pou be kyaa Masedonia na Akaya tɛɛle man nɛ, ne kɛɛ ya abɔɔ ayɛɛsa mo kasee ŋon.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Nawolo nyi lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ, de Gbeŋgyoo nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan te yaasee bo gyu Masedonia na Akaya tɛɛle man kaageŋ ya, mɔna ŋa te yaasee gyu yenaŋ kamasɛ. Mena dɔɔ kolo be doo keŋ dɛɛ yako lee ke man bela ya.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Nawolo nyi mena balaŋ benaŋ pou ne kolosi lee mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ daa gyoŋ man debaŋ keŋ dɔɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ nɛ. Bee kolosi lee mena keŋ ɛ be tina banɛɛ kasom yela, kɔŋ ɛ na som Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ kooŋ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: Bee kolosi mɔ nyi ɛ ne daa ɔ bu Yesu ŋon ɔ be gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ ka bese lee adido kɔŋ. Ŋon Yesu ne gyae la waa lese daa wee keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa mo baŋ di balaŋ nombia nɛ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Me tebia, ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyi da kekɔŋ keŋ dɔɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ nɛ te yɛɛ yakaa ya.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Ɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ bɔɔ naase daa diyem, te bɔɔ fulu daa Filipi donɔɔ man pɛte dɔɔ kɔŋ kaa lii ɛ gyaŋ. Mɔna keŋ na balaŋ ka koro seŋ tia daa koraŋ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ doo daa kakyeŋ te de gyɔɔ de konɔɔ kolosi ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa ŋon.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Nawolo nyi de nombia ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ, te yɛɛ dekara yaa adao nombia ya. Te na dɛɛ gyae bo nyi dɛɛ kɔ ɛ nyeeya man di dɔɔ te dɛɛ yako ŋon mena nombia ŋenaŋ ya.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ na daa do, te ɔ mo nyeedoŋ nombia kɛŋa kekolosi do daa de nyiŋmaa man. Na denibalaŋ kegyaebii yaa dɛɛ yɛɛ ya, mɔna Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ de konɔɔse man nɛ kegyaebii yaa dɛɛ yɛɛ.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Ɛ gyeŋ nideli nyi de ta mo nɔɔwoya ŋan ŋe dana gyoŋ, yaa kabeo nombia kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ na dɛɛ mo nyiŋ kolo lee ɛ gyaŋ ya. Wurubuarɛ gbagba yɛna da adansɛɛte lee mena nombia kɛŋa man.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Da te yɛɛ de nombia na ɛmɛɛ yaa ŋolo ke kɛlɛɛ daa ya. Lee mena keŋ de yɛɛ Kristo kpilalawɔ dɔɔ nɛ, nafɔ gbɛɛ doo nyi dɛɛ mo da wose lɔ ɛ dɔɔ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: Mɔna de yɔkɔse da wose kyaa na ŋon, ŋgba mena keŋ talabo ne kɛɛ ɔ bia dɔɔ nɛ.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Mena keŋ dɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia nideli dɔɔ, na Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ŋaageŋ te da moowɔ kɔna ŋon ya. Mɔna da moo daa gbagba da wose kpu fa ŋon gyoŋ man, nawolo nyi ɛ ta bese balaŋ baŋ ɛ nombia doo de konɔɔ man nideli.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Me tebia, ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ ne tɔɔse mena keŋ dɔɔ yɛɛ tom na kaale nɛ. Debaŋ keŋ dee kolosi Wurubuarɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa ŋon nɛ, de yɛɛ tom nelim na ka weese, na dɔɔ nyiŋ mo de kasolɔ lɔ ŋolo dɔɔ ya.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Ɛmɛɛ Kristotena na Wurubuarɛ ne diina adansɛɛ fa daa nyi, debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ na da wose be dana ayimɛɛ ya. De gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ te da wose mɔ be dana nombiikum daale ya.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Ɛ gyeŋ nyi da tela ŋon ŋgba mena keŋ kya na tela ɔ bia nɛ.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Da wola ŋon kpene keŋ dei, te da doo ŋon kakyeŋ te de kolosiwɔ fa ŋon na ɛ kekyaabii ke nyiŋ kaboena Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be baake ŋon kɔŋ ɔ gyoori na ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ man nɛ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Dɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ ɛ be nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan lee de gyaŋ nɛ, ɛ te lɛɛ nombia ŋenaŋ ŋgba denibalaŋ nombia nɛ ya. Mɔna ɛ lɛɛ ŋa di nyi ŋe yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋa ampaŋ. Mena nombia kɛŋa ne yɛɛ na tom ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ man.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: De tebia, da te naa nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ be yɛɛ Kristo Yesu wui, te be kyaa Gyudia tɛɛle man nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ naa diyem ɛ tebia nyiŋmaa man, ŋgba mena keŋ baŋ mɔ be naa diyem be tebia Gyudatena nyiŋmaa man nɛ.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Baŋ Gyudatena benaŋ koona de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu, na Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra, te be naase daa mɔ diyem gegi daa lee be donɔɔse man. Be nombia bɛɛ gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia ya, te bɔɔ ne gyae balaŋ mɔ nombia ya.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Nawolo nyi be ta koro seŋ tɔ daa gbɛɛ, na dɔɔ nyiŋ kolosi nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, na Wurubuarɛ ke nyiŋ lɛɛ ba nyee ya. Kei te yeli be nombiakumɛɛ ta boo kpu, mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ ta gyeŋ baŋ nyi waa wɔŋ ba deŋele.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: De tebia, ba ke yela daa na ŋon nsana ketira te dii ta weeya ya. Keŋ na de kyaa lem na lem de bɛɛ naa dɔŋa koraŋ ya nɛ, ɛ nombia doo de konɔɔ man nideli. Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ gyae gbɛɛ nideli nyi dɛɛ bese kɔŋ kaa kɛɛ ŋon.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Nafɔ de gyae gbɛɛ nyi dɛɛ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ. Tuturu na, maŋ Pɔɔl gbagba yɛɛ kakyeŋ agbaatee agbaatee nyi maa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ, mɔna ɔbɔnsam te yeli dee nyiŋ gbɛɛ ya.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: De gyaewɔ nyi dɛɛ bese kɔŋ kaa naa ŋon, nawolo nyi da gyeŋ nyi ɛ seŋɛɛ ɛ kelɛɛdi man nideli. Mena dɔɔ de loo gyakaa ɛ dɔɔ nideli nyi, wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, ɛmɛɛ ne gyae la ɛ ke yela waa kɛlɛɛ daa na dee nyiŋ yele na de sia kagye ɔ siaman.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Kegbagba na, ɛmɛɛ ne gyae la ɛ ke yela dee nyiŋ yele na dee di gyoŋ.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Nɛnɛɛ da kena nyi nombia ta kela daa keŋ dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ tale kaa naa ŋon dɔɔ ya nɛ, de yɛɛ da agyueŋ nyi dɛɛ bese kyaa Atɛnse donɔɔ man.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: Mena dɔɔ dee kpila de dɔɔ Timoti ŋon ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tobaale e, te ɔ kpuɛ na daa Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan kekolosi man nɛ ɛ gyaŋ. Dee kpila e nyi ɔ kaa do ŋon kakyeŋ na ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: na nyi akpaa kayeyɛɛ kei dinɔɔ de kɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ na, ɛ man ŋolo be nyiŋ bese ɔ wɔle ya. Nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nideli nyiaa, mena kayeyɛɛ kei yɛɛ kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi gyae ke kɔŋ de dɔɔ.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, de wulaa yako ŋon agbaatee agbaatee nyiaa, baa naase daa diyem ŋgba mena keŋ be kɔŋ te ɛ ne naa nɛ.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Ɛ kayeyɛɛ keŋ ɛ na yeyɛɛ nɛ ne takaa maŋ nideli, te ma te gyae gbɛɛ keŋ maa mo kɔŋ botɔɔ kina. Mena dɔɔ te mee kpila Timoti ɛ gyaŋ. Me kpila e bo nyi waa kɔŋ kaa kɛɛ nyi ɛ seŋɛɛ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ. Nawolo nyi me wɔe ne lɔ maŋ nyi, nnɛ ɔbɔnsam te kaa kɛɛse ŋon kɛɛ yela ɛ te tina ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ yela. Nyi de kɔŋ mena na, na da tom keŋ pou te yɛɛ yakaa.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Mɔna Timoti ka lee ɛ gyaŋ kɔŋ yaa, te ɔ te kɔŋ kaa yako daa nombia kpaakpaa nyi ɛ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man te ɛ ne gyae balaŋ mɔ. Ɔ te kaa yako daa nyi debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ne tɔɔse daa, te ɛ sia te yɛɛ nyi ɛ kena daa ŋgba mena keŋ daa mɔ ne gyae nyi dɛɛ naa ŋon nɛ.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: De tebia, mena dɔɔ keŋ na de kayeyɛɛ na be kɛɛ naase daa diyem pou man na, ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ na do daa kakyeŋ.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Nawolo nyi lee mena keŋ ɛ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ man dɔɔ, de wɔe te fɛɛ daa nideli.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Nɔɔkado woŋti kaboela keŋ dɛɛ tale mo do Wurubuarɛ, lee kpene keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ? Dɛɛ fa e karaŋ lee gyoŋ keŋ dɔɔ nyim ɔ siaman lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Nelim na ka weese na dɛɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyiaa, waa yela dɛɛ bese naa ŋon na de sia, na dɛɛ kyɔ ŋon na ɛ ka seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ kelii ɔto.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Dɛɛ fane nyi de kya Wurubuarɛ gbagba na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu, baa toro gbɛɛ fa daa na dɛɛ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Dɛɛ fane nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa yela ɛ balaŋ kegyae keŋ ke doo ɛ man nideli, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyae dɔŋa na balaŋ pou, ŋgba mena keŋ daa mɔ ne gyae ŋon nɛ.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa desina ɛ konɔɔse man, na wee keŋ ŋon na balaŋ baŋ pou Wurubuarɛ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ baa kɔŋ na, ɛ ke yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ayimɛɛ na nombiikum kamasɛ be doo ɛ man ya de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋonaŋ siaman.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: De tebia, nombia ŋan be kaa mɛɛ gyae maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi, da wola ŋon mena keŋ yaa kyaa na ɛ kekyaabii na ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou kenyiŋ gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ be taŋ wulaa ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ. Dɛɛ waase ŋon lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man nyi, ɛ kyaŋ ke keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke yɛɛ kela mena gba.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Nawolo nyi ɛ gyeŋ nombia ŋan dɔɔ tɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo doŋ dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii yɛna nyi ɛ na mo ayimɛɛ wuu ɛ wose ya, na ɛ ka lese ɛ wose lee kafoŋ nombia man.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ waa gyeŋ mena keŋ waa tela ɔ wose nideli lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, ŋgba mena keŋ na gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia te ke dana obuo mɔ nɛ.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: Ɛ na yɛɛ kewɔlɛɛ nombia ŋgba mena keŋ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya ne yɛɛ nɛ ya.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Mena ke mɔ te ŋolo na yɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ nombiikum yaa ɔ na ŋere e do ya. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ mena nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou na, de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ ɔtenate deŋele ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wulaa yako ŋon te dɔɔ faree ŋon nɛ.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te baake daa kɔŋ ɔ gyaŋ nyi de kaa yɛɛ ayimɛɛ nombia ya, mɔna ɔ baake daa bo nyi de kaa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ayimɛɛ be doo ba wose man ya.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Mena dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ mena kawola kei na, na deniwalaŋ nombia te ɔ bɛɛwɔ ya mɔna Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ba mo ɔ feliŋ do ɛ man nɛ nombia yaa ɔ bɛɛwɔ.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Nɛnɛɛ lee ɛmɛɛ na ɛ tebia dɔŋa kegyae wose man nombia dɔɔ, tekaboena nyi dɛɛ bese ŋmarase ke man kolo yelee ŋon bela ya, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te wulaa wola ŋon nyi yaa gyae dɔŋa.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi ɛ wulaa ɛ ne gyae ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Masedonia tɛɛle keŋ pou dɔɔ nɛ. Mɔna de tebia, dɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyi yaa yɛɛ kela mena.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Ɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na ɛ ke kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man, na ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ ke nyii na ɔ wui. Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ kyaŋ ɛ wose yɛɛ tom, ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wulaa wola ŋon nɛ.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Ɛ yɛɛ mena na, ɛ be gyae ɛ ka mo ɛ wose lɔ ŋolo dɔɔ ya. Kei gyae ke yela balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ kpuɛ na ŋon ya nɛ ke bu ŋon.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: De tebia, lee balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ wose man nombia dɔɔ, dɔɔ ne gyae ɛ ke kyaa ditiŋtɛɛ man na ɛ ka yeyɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be loo be gyakaa kolo dɔɔ nɛ ya.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Dɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi Yesu yeŋawɔ te Wurubuarɛ gyuusu e lee yeŋ man. Mena ke mɔ te dɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi wee keŋ Yesu waa bese kɔŋ na, Wurubuarɛ waa gyuusu baŋ pou bɔɔ lɛɛ e di pɛte bɔɔ yem nɛ lee yeŋ man na baa kpu na e.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ɔ ba wolo te dɛɛ yako ŋon nɛ yɛna nyi wee keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, daa baŋ dɔɔ kaa te de sɛɛ de kyaa nyeedoŋ man nɛ, dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ taŋgbɛɛ baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ foŋ gyu ke gyaŋee na e ya.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Nawolo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu gbagba waa mo yeesa dinaa kolosi lee adido kɔŋ, te Wurubuarɛ kpilale kegyia ŋon mɔ waa mo yeesa kolosi, na baa wola Wurubuarɛ kaberɛ keŋ. Dekɔŋ mena na, balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ e di pɛte bɔɔ yem nɛ, baŋ ne gyae la baa taŋgbɛɛ foŋ lee yeŋ man.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Kenaŋ wɔle na, daa baŋ de sɛɛ de kyaa nyeedoŋ man debaŋ kenaŋ nɛ, baa mo daa na wɔ pou gyu adido ŋɔma man, na de kaa gyaŋee na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na daa na e ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ mo mena nombia kɛŋa do dɔŋa kakyeŋ.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: De tebia, bɛɛ tekaa hia nyi ŋolo waa bese ŋmarase kolo lee debaŋ yaa wee keŋ mena nombia kɛŋa gyae kekɔŋ nɛ wose man nombia fa ŋon bela ya.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyi wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, gyae ke yɛɛ bo ŋgba mena keŋ ŋmɛɛlate ne kɔŋ nelim nɛ.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Debaŋ keŋ balaŋ baa yako nyi, De kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man, te de wɔe mɔ bɛɛ lɔ daa ya nɛ, mena debaŋ kenaŋ te kayeyɛɛ dinaa gyae kaa futaa wɔ, ŋgba mena keŋ kadoŋee ne futaa fulute nɛ. Dekɔŋ mena na, be man ŋolo na ŋolo be gyae waa tale lese ɔ wose lee mena kayeyɛɛ kenaŋ man ya.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Mɔna de tebia, ɛmɛɛ ba tekaa doo ditiŋtɛɛ man, na wee kenaŋ kaa futaa ŋon ŋgba ŋmɛɛlate nɛ ya.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Nawolo nyi ɛ popou yɛɛ keŋmaŋee man balaŋwɔ, te ɛ doo keŋmaŋee kenaŋ man. Dɔɔ tekaa yɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man balaŋ baŋ be dɔŋ ditiŋtɛɛ man nɛ ya.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na yeli dee doo wolee da wose, ŋgba mena keŋ baale ne yɛɛ ne ya. Mɔna ɛ yela dee doo da wose dɔɔ na dɛɛ deke nideli.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Nawolo nyi baŋ bee doo nɛ ne doo bo nelim, te baŋ mɔ bɛɛ dɛɛse nɛ ne dɛɛse bo balinɔɔ.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Mɔna keŋ daa doo keŋmaŋee man dɔɔ, ɛ yela dɛɛ kɛɛ da wose dɔɔ nideli na dɛɛ mo da kelɛɛdi na de balaŋ kegyae mo yɛɛ nyeele pampasaŋ mo gyee da wose ŋgba yoonɔɔtena nɛ, na dɛɛ mo da nyeekelɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ wuu da nyeeya dɔɔ ŋgba nyeele kotɔtɔɔ nɛ.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te baake daa nyi waa naase daa diyem ya, mɔna ɔ baake daa bo nyi dɛɛ ta de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ nyiŋ nyeekelɛɛ.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: Ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yeŋa la fa daa, mena dɔɔ nyi de kyae na de sia yaa da yeŋae koraŋ na, daa na e pou dɛɛ kyaa.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Mena dɔɔ ɛ kolosi fa dɔŋa na ɛ ka do dɔŋa kakyeŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ ne taŋ yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: De tebia, nɛnɛɛ dɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyiaa, balaŋ baŋ de Gbeŋgyoo ba lese wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ ɛ siamantena, te bɛɛ yɛɛ ba tom na kakyeŋ kolosi fa ŋon nɛ, ɛ bu wɔ nideli.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Ɛ gyae wɔ na ɛ ke bu wɔ nideli lee ba tom keŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ, na ɛ ke kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man na dɔŋa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: De tebia, dee kolosi fa ŋon nyiaa, ɛ kolosi fa kebɔŋaletena baŋ. Ɛ kolosi do baŋ gyakoloŋ dana wɔ nɛ. Ɛ kyɔ baŋ bɔɔ dana doŋ ya nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Ɛ kɛɛ nyi ŋolo na ŋolo na mo dukum tɔ dukum kom ya, mɔna ɛ yɛɛ deeli fa dɔŋa na balaŋ pou debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Ɛ kyaa gyoŋ man debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Ɛ fane debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ abɔɔ pou man debaŋ kamasɛ. Mena nombia kɛŋa te Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nyi yaa yɛɛ, nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yɛɛ dokoloŋ.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Ɛ na ko Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ ba mo do ɛ man nɛ nɔɔ ya.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Ɛ na lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɔ be tɛɛ wa akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra dɔɔ kolosi nɛ aŋmaareŋ ya.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Mɔna ɛ gyoo nombia pou man kɛɛ, na ɛ ke kyaŋ ŋan dei nɛ man nideli.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee nombiikum kamasɛ man.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Dɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Wurubuarɛ e nɛ, nyi waa gberaa ɛ wose ayimɛɛ pou leki na waa yela ɛ gbɛɛneŋ ka tenee keŋ nombiikum daale na doo ɛ man ya, mo kelii wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ nɛ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be baake ŋon nɛ, waa yela kekɔŋ mena nawolo nyi ɔ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: De tebia, ɛ fane fa daa mɔ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Ɛ do de tebia Kristotena baŋ pou nɔɔ nideli.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: Mɛɛ waase ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo yele man nyiaa, ɛ kala tɔne kei fa ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ pou.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl na Silase na Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man, te ɛ yɛɛ de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo balaŋwɔ nɛ.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: De tebia, kaboena nyi wee na wee na dɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ na bee kpu, te walaŋ kamasɛ mɔ balaŋ kegyae keŋ ɔ dana fa ɔ dɔɔ nɛ na bee kpu.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Lee mena dɔɔ dɛɛ tale gyɔ de konɔɔ kolosi ɛ wose man nombia Wurubuarɛ balaŋ man yenaŋ kamasɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ kayeyɛɛ na ɛ diyem kena pou man koraŋ na, ɛ ne yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Kɛŋa pou na lese la wola nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia na ke gbɛɛ bo. Kei gyae ke yela ɛ ke kaboena Wurubuarɛ gyoori keŋ dɔɔ ɛ ne naa diyem nɛ man kagyoo.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia na ke gbɛɛ, mena dɔɔ waa tɔ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ naase ŋon diyem nɛ kom.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: na waa yela daa baŋ de yɛɛ ɔ balaŋwɔ te dɛɛ naa diyem nɛ ke fɛɛfo wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na ɔ kpilala baŋ be dana doŋ te boalaŋ gyae ke kilisiwɔ lee adido kɔŋ nɛ.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ e ya, te be ta mo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan yɛɛ kolo ya nɛ deŋele.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Waa wɔŋ mena balaŋ benaŋ deŋele, na baa naa diyem kekpaakekpaa. Keŋ kpuɛ bela yɛna nyi, waa lese wɔ lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na ɔ gyoori dinaa keŋ man.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: Debaŋ kenaŋ man keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, ɔ balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ be baake wɔ te ɔ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ baa lese ɔ yele adido, na baŋ pou bɔɔ lɛɛ e di nɛ ke kɛlɛɛ e. Ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ ke kpu na wɔ, nawolo nyi ɛ lɛɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ di.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Lee mena nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ te dɛɛ fane fa ŋon debaŋ kamasɛ nɛ. Dɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ nyi waa yela ɛ ke kaboena ɔ kebaake keŋ ɔ be baake ŋon nɛ, na waa fa ŋon doŋ na ɛ ka mo tɔɔle nombia kpaakpaa ŋan pou ɛ ne gyae ɛ ke yɛɛ nɛ. Na ɛ ke tale yɛɛ tom keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ kelii ɔto lee mena keŋ ɛ ne lɛɛ e di nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: De kɔŋ mena na, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele gyae ka koro adido. Balaŋ baa naa ɔ gyoori keŋ, te Yesu dɔɔ ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ yele gyae ka lee. Lee de kya Wurubuarɛ, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo bɛrɛɛ keŋ bɔɔ mo boele ŋon dɔɔ, baa yela kekɔŋ mena.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: Me tebia, lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ na mena keŋ waa yilaa de popou mena wee kenaŋ nɛ man nombia yaa mɛɛ gyae maa lese wola ŋon nideli nɛ.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: Balaŋ baale dɔŋ bɛɛ yako nyiaa, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu taŋ ke kɔŋ. Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ sola ŋon bo nyi, ɛ na yele mena nombia kɛŋa ke yela ɛ wɔe kelɔ ŋon ya. Nnɛ balaŋ baale te di dekara nyi daa kpa Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yako na daa nombia kɛŋa te daa mɔ kaa yako ŋon yaa daa gbagba yako na ŋon nombia kɛŋa yaa daa gbagba ŋmarase na tɔne yelee ŋon nyi Yesu taŋ ke kɔŋ.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Ɛ na yeli ŋolo ka beo ŋon lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man ya. Nawolo nyi pɛna wee dinaa kenaŋ kekɔŋ na, balaŋ baa koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ. Mena ke te baa lese walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee di mmaraase dɔɔ ya nɛ debɔɔ pɛna wee kenaŋ kelii. Ŋon yɛna walaŋkum ŋon boalaŋ man te waa doo kekpaakekpaa nɛ.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Waa gyina ɔ wose adido, na waa koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ na kpene kamasɛ keŋ balaŋ na som nɛ. Waa kaa kyaa Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man, na waa yako nyi ŋon yɛna Wurubuarɛ.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Ɛ bɛɛ tɔɔse nyi debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ na, mɛɛ kyaa yako ŋon mena nombia kɛŋa yee?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ɛ gyeŋ kpene keŋ be kyaŋ e dɔɔse dɔɔ te ɔ te kɔŋa ta ya. Debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba see e nyi waa kɔŋ nɛ de lii na, waa kɔŋ.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Balaŋ taŋ ke fiasɛɛ bɛɛ lee Wurubuarɛ wɔle yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ weese. Mɔna pɛna nombii keŋ mɔɔ yako ŋon nyi gyae kekɔŋ nɛ ke kɔŋ na, kaboena nyi Wurubuarɛ waa lese walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tɔ ke gbɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Kenaŋ wɔle na te baa lese walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee di mmaraase dɔɔ ya nɛ debɔɔ. De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nɔɔman weesɛɛ te waa mo feefu e ko, na waa mo ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋalakee keŋ wɔlɛɛ e kekpaakekpaa.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee di mmaraase dɔɔ ya na, waa mo ɔbɔnsam doŋ bo kɔŋ. Waa kaa beo yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia na nombia dinaana burum.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: Waa mo nombiakumɛɛ kamasɛ beo baŋ pou baa yeŋ leki nɛ. Baa yeŋ leki kekpaa nawolo nyi ba te bɛɛ nyi bɔɔ lɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ, ŋan gyae ke yela Wurubuarɛ ke lɛɛ ba nyee nɛ do ya.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Lee mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te yeli akɛrɛɛ nombia te kaa gyoo be man, te akɛrɛɛ nombia ŋaageŋ te bɛɛ lɛɛ di.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa bu balaŋ baŋ pou ba te lɛɛ anokoare nombia ŋan di ya, te bɛɛ gyae akɛrɛɛ nombia bo nɛ fɔɔ.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Mɔna ɛmɛɛ de tebia baŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ne gyae ŋon nɛ dɔɔ, kaboena nyi debaŋ kamasɛ na dɛɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee ɛ dɔɔ. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ wulaa lese ŋon see leenaŋ kewalaŋ keŋ nyi waa lɛɛ ɛ nyee. Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ɔ feliŋ ŋon doŋ man te ɔ desina ŋon see, nawolo nyi ɛ lɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ di.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ŋon Wurubuarɛ tɛɛ la nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ dɔɔ baake ŋon kɔŋ nyeedoŋ kei man, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo gyoori keŋ man.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: De tebia, lee mena dɔɔ ɛ seŋ keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke kyaŋ de nombia ŋan dɛɛ wola ŋon nɛ, na ŋan dee kolosi fa ŋon nɛ, na ŋan dɔɔ ŋmarase yelee ŋon nɛ man nideli.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: De kya Wurubuarɛ ne gyae daa, te ɔ tɛɛwɔ ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ do daa kakyeŋ kekpaakekpaa, te ɔ faa daa loo kegyakaa kpaakpaate. Dɛɛ solo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo gbagba na de kya Wurubuarɛ.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: baa do ŋon kakyeŋ na baa fa ŋon doŋ na ɛ ke tale yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa lee ɛ kekolosi na ya abɔɔ ayɛɛsa pou man.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: De tebia, nombia ŋan be kaa mɛɛ gyae maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi ɛ fane fa daa, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ke nyiŋ gbɛɛ yaasee bileŋbileŋ na balaŋ ke lɛɛ ŋa di obuo man ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ ŋa di obuo man nɛ.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Ɛ bese fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa lese daa lee nombiakumɛɛ na balaŋ kumɛɛ nyiŋmaa man, nawolo nyi na balaŋ pou lɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ di ya.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ, mena dɔɔ waa do ŋon doŋ na waa kɛɛ ɛ dɔɔ keŋ nyi ɛ ba gyoo walaŋkum ŋon nyiŋmaa man ya.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Dɛɛ lɛɛ di lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man nyi ɛ ne yɛɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ. Te dɛɛ lɛɛ di mɔ nyi ɛ ke yɛɛ mena kelii ɔto.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Dɛɛ sola de Gbeŋgyoo nyi waa desina ɛ konɔɔse na ɛ ka gyeŋ kegyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ŋon nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ kayeyɛɛ man ŋgba mena keŋ Kristo mɔ be nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ nɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: De tebia, dɛɛ faree ŋon lee Yesu Kristo yele man nyiaa, Kristobaale kamasɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ kebɔŋalete e te ɔ nombia ayɛɛsa mɔ bɛɛ kyaa na nombia ŋan dɔɔ wola ŋon ya nɛ, ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ man.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ kaboena nyi yaa kasee daa, nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ da te yɛɛ kebɔŋale ya.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: Mena mɔ te de te di ŋolo weenɛɛ yakaa keŋ nyi da te tɔ e kom ya. Mɔna de yase de sia kyaŋ da wose yɛɛ tom nideli nelim na ka weese, na dɔɔ nyiŋ bese kasolɔ ɛ man ŋolo dɔɔ ya.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Ka te yɛɛ nyi gbɛɛ be doo keŋ nyi dɛɛ lɛɛ kolo lee ɛ gyaŋ bo dɔɔ te de yɛɛ tom mena ya, mɔna de yɛe mena na kabese kolo kekasee fa ŋon na ɛ ke nyiŋ kasee daa.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
