local: Debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ koraŋ na de faa ŋon mmaraa nyiaa, Nyi akpaa ŋolo bɛɛ gyae nyi waa yɛɛ tom ya nɛ, tekaboena nyi waa di ya.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: De te nyii nyi ɛ man balaŋ baale dɔŋɛɛ keŋ bɔɔ ne yɛɛ tom daale ya. Be dɔŋ bo bɛɛ do be nɔɔse balaŋ nombia man.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ faree mena balaŋ benaŋ te dɛɛ do wɔ kakyeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele man nyiaa, baa tisi kyaa ba mokɔɔ dɔɔ na baa yɛɛ tom na baa nyiŋ kolo do be nɔɔman.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: De tebia, ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ na yela nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ ke takaa ŋon ya.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Akpaa ŋolo te di de nombia ŋan doo tɔne kei man dɔɔ ya nɛ, ɛ mo ɛ sia gyakaa ɔ dɔɔ na ɛ ke wɔŋ ɛ wose lee ɔ man, na desɛŋ kenyiŋ kyaŋ e.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Mɔna ɛ na kɛɛ e nyi ɔ yɛɛ ɛ kɔlare e ya, ɛ faree e ŋgba ɛ dɔɔ Kristobaale nɛ.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Nɛnɛɛ dɛɛ fane nyi Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ, waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ abɔɔ pou man debaŋ kamasɛ na waa kpu na ɛ popou.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Maŋ Pɔɔl gbagba moona me nyiŋmaa ŋmarase nɔɔkado tɔne kei mee yelee ŋon nɛ. Mena keŋmarase kei te mɛɛ ŋmarase me tɔna pou man lese wola nyi maŋ ŋmarase la.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl gyaŋ. Da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ, lese na maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ Kristo kpilale.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Mɛɛ ŋmarase tɔne kei mee yelee nyaŋ Timoti ŋon lee Yesu Kristo kelɛɛdi man dɔɔ te n ba bese me bu gbagba nɛ. Mɛɛ fane nyi de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele neŋ, na baa wii n waraŋase na baa fa neŋ wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Ŋgba mena keŋ mee gyu Masedonia tɛɛle man te mɔɔ do neŋ kakyeŋ nyi nya kyaa Efeso donɔɔ man nɛ, mena yaa mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke kyaa botɔɔ. Na n ke tɔ balaŋ baŋ be kyaa Efeso botɔɔ bɛɛ wola akɛrɛɛ kawola Kristo ɔsom keŋ man nɛ nyi baa tina ŋa yela bileŋ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Yako wɔ nyi be na wɔlɛɛ debaŋ na beneŋ beneŋ ŋɔla kegyɔ, na be naanaɔ kalola kegyakaare nombia kawola ya. Nawolo nyi kɛŋa pou na mo aŋmaareŋ bo kɔŋ, te ŋe bee yeli balaŋ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii ya. N lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di na te nyaŋ ke tale yɛɛ ɔ kegyaebii.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Keŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako neŋ mena nombia kɛŋa yɛna nyiaa, mɛɛ gyae nyi kegyae keŋ ba lee konɔɔ kpaakpaa man nɛ, na konɔɔ man nombia kpaakpaa na Kristo kelɛɛdi kpaakpaate keŋ ke doo Kristo walaŋ kamasɛ man.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Balaŋ baale ta yoo gbɛɛ lee abɔɔ kpaakpaa kɛŋa man te ba gyoo afa kumɛɛ keyɔɔ.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Bɛɛ gyae nyi baa bese Wurubuarɛ mmaraa wolala, mɔna kpene keŋ baŋ gbagba ne kolosi na nombia ŋan dɔɔ ba seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ bee kolosi nɛ bɔɔ gyeŋ ŋe man ya.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Da gyeŋ nyi mmaraa dei. Akpaa ŋolo de di ke dɔɔ nideli na ke dei fa e.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Da gyeŋ mɔ nyi ba te yɛɛ mmaraa bo fa balaŋ kpaakpaa ya. Mɔna be yɛɛ ke bo fa baŋ bɔɔ ne di mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ ya, na baŋ bɔɔ ne yɔkɔse ba wose ya, na baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya na nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra na baŋ ayimɛɛ doo ba wose man na baŋ bɔɔ ne sila Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ ya, na baŋ bɛɛ koe be kyaɔ yaa be naɔ nɛ na baŋ mɔ bɛɛ koe balaŋ nɛ.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: na kafoŋtena na baala baŋ bee doo na dɔŋa, na baŋ bɛɛ mo balaŋ gyae kɔba, na akɛrɛɛtena na baŋ bɛɛ beo kaŋ ntamse, na kpene kamasɛ keŋ bɛɛ kyaa na kawola kpaakpaate keŋ ya nɛ.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Mena kawola kpaakpaa kei kyaawɔ na nyeedoŋ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan Wurubuarɛ ba mo do me nyiŋmaa man nyi maa kolosi fa balaŋ nɛ. Kawola kpaakpaa kei lee Wurubuarɛ doŋte ŋon balaŋ na lese ɔ yele nɛ gyaŋ.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: Mɛɛ fa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ be fa maŋ doŋ kei nyi maa yɛɛ ɔ tom nɛ karaŋ. Mɛɛ fa e karaŋ ŋgba ɔ be kɛɛ maŋ nyi me yɛɛ walaŋ kpaakpaa e, te ɔ ba lese maŋ nyi me kaboena nyi maa yɛɛ ɔ tom keŋ ɔ ba mo do maŋ me nyiŋmaa man nɛ.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Gyaŋgba keŋ na me kolosi mmusuo nombia tia Yesu, te me naase ɔ kaseela baŋ diyem te me kɔla wɔ mɔ. Mɔna kɛŋa pou wɔle na Wurubuarɛ wii me waraŋase, nawolo nyi na mɔɔ gyeŋ keŋ mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ ya te ma te lɛɛ Kristo mɔ di ya.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele maŋ nideli, te ɔ yela me lɛɛ e di te ɔ moo ɔ kegyae keŋ do me man.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Kei yɛna anokoare nombii keŋ kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa lɛɛ di. Nombii kenaŋ yɛna nyi, Kristo Yesu kɔŋae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ɔ kaa lɛɛ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra nyee. Maŋ Pɔɔl gba yɛna nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra pou nyee.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: Mɔna lee mena nombii kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ wii me waraŋase, na Yesu Kristo ke nyiŋ ta maŋ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra pou nyee kei dɔɔ lese ɔ konɔɔ keŋ ɔ dana nɛ wola. Na ka ke yɛɛ kekasee nombii fa balaŋ baŋ pou baa kaa lɛɛ e di na baa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ nɛ.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Ɛ yela dɛɛ kɛlɛɛ e nyi, Nyaŋ nyaageŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ na gyoo ŋon n kyaa kekpaakekpaa. Nyaŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ ŋon n bɛɛ yem ya, te ŋolo mɔ bɛɛ naa neŋ na ɔ sia fonɛɛ ya. Nyaŋ nyaageŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ ŋon n kaboena nyi baa mo obuo na gyoorobiiri fa neŋ kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: Me bu Timoti, nombia ŋan mɔɔ mo do n nyiŋmaa man, na ŋan Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra be wulaa yako see lee n wose man nɛ, mena nombia ŋenaŋ pou yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Mena dɔɔ mo nombia ŋenaŋ tela ŋgba yoo abɔɔ nɛ, na n ka mo yoo na akɛrɛɛ nombia wolala baŋ.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: Na tina n kelɛɛdi na n konɔɔ man nombia kpaakpaa ŋan yela ya. Baale te bɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa te be yela ba Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ mɔ wɔlɛɛwɔ.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Balaŋ benaŋ baale yɛna Hameneyose na Alɛkesanda. Me ta mo wɔ fa ɔbɔnsam nyi waa wɔŋ ba deŋela na bɔɔ tekaa kolosi mmusuo nombia tia Wurubuarɛ bela ya.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Mena dɔɔ kpene keŋ mɛɛ gyae ɛ ke taŋgbɛɛ yɛɛ yɛna nyi, mɛɛ waase ŋon nyi yaa fane fa walaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ka sola Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ fa wɔ. Ɛ sola Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ fa wɔ, na ɛ ke fa e karaŋ lee kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɔ ne yɛɛ fa wɔ nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Mena mɔ te kaboena nyi yaa fane fa gyooneŋ na balaŋ baŋ pou bee di doŋ de dɔɔ nɛ, na de wɔe ke fɛɛ daa na dee nyiŋ kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man na dee nyiŋ som Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛ kpaakpaate man lee da kekyaabii man.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Mena nombia kɛŋa deila, te ŋɛɛ gyoo da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ ŋon sia.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nyi waa lɛɛ walaŋ kamasɛ nyee na baa gyeŋ wa anokoare keŋ.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ kooŋ kyaa la, te walaŋ dokoloŋ kooŋ mɔ doo la Wurubuarɛ na balaŋ nsana. Ŋon yɛna Yesu Kristo.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: Yesu kei moona ɔ wose fa yeŋ tɔ balaŋ pou nyeeman kom lee ba dukum keŋ bɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ. Mena nombii kei te Wurubuarɛ yɛɛwɔ debaŋ keŋ ɔ ba see nɛ man, na kedi adansɛɛ fa balaŋ pou nyi ɔ ne gyae nyi baa nyiŋ nyeekelɛɛ.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Lee kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ lese maŋ nyi maa bese ɔ kpilale, na maa yako ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ. Nombia ŋan mɛɛ yako nɛ te yɛɛ dekara ya.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ gyae nyi baala baa gyina ba nyiŋmaase ŋan ayimɛɛ be doo ŋe man ya nɛ adido, na baa fane debaŋ kamasɛ. Be na mo baŋ na aŋmaareŋ do ba kefane man ya.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: Mena mɔ te mɛɛ gyae nyi ala baa do abɔɔ ŋan kaboena nɛ, na baa desina ŋa nideli. Be na do ba nyeenyɔɔse adaose beiŋ ŋgba balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋ nɛ ya. Te be na mo kɔba abɔɔ na abɔɔ ŋan ŋa koya dana doŋ nɛ mia ba wose ŋgba mena keŋ tekaboena nɛ ya.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: Mɔna baa yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan kaboena na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ som Wurubuarɛ nɛ.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Kaboena nyi ala baa yɔkɔse ba wose na baa kyaa yididi na baa kasee Wurubuarɛ nombia.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Mɔɔ ne fa ala gbɛɛ nyi baa wola yaa baa di doŋ baala dɔɔ ya. Kaboena nyi baa wuu be nɔɔ.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Nawolo nyi Adam te Wurubuarɛ taŋgbɛɛwɔ yɛɛ, pɛte ɔ yɛɛ Efa.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Na Adam te ɔbɔnsam beowɔ ya. Mɔna alo ŋon te ɔbɔnsam beowɔ te ɔ leewɔ Wurubuarɛ wɔle yɛɛ dukum.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Mɔna akpaa alo de kyaa ɔ kelɛɛdi man nideli na balaŋ kegyae te ayimɛɛ be doo ɔ konɔɔ man ya na, Wurubuarɛ waa lɛɛ e ɔ kalola man.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi Akpaa ŋolo ne gyae waa yɛɛ Kristotena kegyia na, tom kpaakpaate yaa ɔ ne gyae nɛ.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Kaboena nyi Kristotena kegyia waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ wose man be dana nombiikum keŋ balaŋ baa naa kolosi ya. Kaboena nyi ɔ wɛɛle dɛɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ sia doo tɛɛle man te ɔ ne tale di ɔ wose dɔɔ. Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ wose man dana obuo te ɔ ne tale lɛɛ ŋɔɔla. Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tale wola nombia mɔ.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: Ɔ na yɛɛ soloŋnyɔɔre e ya te ɔ na yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ wose ne gyae nombia mɔ ya, mɔna waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ woɛ. Ɔ na yɛɛ kale gyaere e ya, te ɔ na yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ sia ne yɛɛ kɔba beiŋ ya.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tale kɛɛ ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli, te ɔ bia mɔ ne nyii ɔ dei nideli te bee bu e lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Nawolo nyi akpaa ŋolo bɛɛ tale kɛɛ ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli ya na, sena te waa tale kɛɛ Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ nideli?.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Walaŋ ŋonaŋ na yɛɛ walaŋ wɔle ɔsom keŋ man ya. Na mena ya na waa gyina ɔ wose adido na waa yala, na Wurubuarɛ ke bu e fɔɔ ŋgba mena keŋ ɔbɔnsam be yɛɛ te Wurubuarɛ be bu e fɔɔ nɛ.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Kaboena nyi balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ doo Kristo man koraŋ ya nɛ, baa baake Kristotena kegyia ŋonaŋ yele kpaakpaa, na ɔ be nyiŋ yala ɔbɔnsam kɔta man na desɛŋ kedi e ya.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Mena mɔ te kaboena nyi kegyiise baŋ bɛɛ kyɔ siamantena baŋ ɔsom keŋ man nɛ, baa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ba wose man dana obuo te balaŋ mɔ ne lɛɛ wɔ di nideli. Tekaboena nyi baa yɛɛ soloŋnyɔɔrawɔ ya, te be sia mɔ na yɛɛ kɔba dɔɔ beiŋ ya.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Baa mo konɔɔ kpaakpaa kyaŋ anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola wɔ lee ba kelɛɛdi keŋ man nɛ nideli.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Kaboena nyi Kristotena baa gyoo kegyiise baŋ man nideli, na baa kɛɛ nyi nombiikum kamasɛ be doo be man ya pɛna baa mo wɔ see kegyiise.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Mena mɔ te kaboena nyi be wɛɛla baa yɛɛ ala baŋ ba wose man dana obuo, te bɔɔ ne gyae balaŋ wose man nombia kekolosi ya. Kaboena nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, na balaŋ ke nyiŋ tale mo ba wose lɔ be dɔɔ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Kaboena nyi kegyia wɛɛle dɛɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ, te waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tale kɛɛ ɔ bia na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Kegyiise baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ tom nideli nɛ, baa nyiŋ daseŋae kpaakpaa na baa nyiŋ doŋ mo di adansɛɛ lee ba kelɛɛdi keŋ doo Yesu Kristo man nɛ man.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Me loo gyakaa nyi be gyae ke kyare ya maa kɔŋ n gyaŋ. Te mɛɛ ŋmarase neŋ tɔne kei baa na.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: nyi me dɔɔ wɔle koraŋ nɛ, tɔne kei gyae ke yela n ka gyeŋ mena keŋ kaboena nyi balaŋ baa kyaa Wurubuarɛ dekpaŋalaŋ man. Dekpaŋalaŋ kenaŋ man balaŋ yɛna Kristotena dikpii keŋ be yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ balaŋwɔ nɛ. Anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ, Kristotena dikpii kei yɛna ka mokɔɔ na ka tuula.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan ta tekaa yɛɛ nombia aweeseŋ dɔ ɔsom keŋ man ya nɛ, yɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe dana yuŋ. Nombia kɛŋa te dɛɛ mo nɔɔdokoloŋ yako nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ ta lese ɔ wose wola ŋgba deniwalaŋ nɛ. Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ta lese e wola nyi ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman. Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ naa e, te Kristotena yako ɔ wose man nombia tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ. Balaŋ lɛɛ e di tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ, te Wurubuarɛ moo e gyu adido gyoorobiiri man.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yakowɔ nideli nyiaa, tɛɛle kei da benaa kɔ ɔto na balaŋ baale baa tina Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi yela, na baa tei feliŋkumɛɛ na ɔbɔnsam dekarate ŋon nombia.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Mena kawola kɛŋa lee balaŋ baŋ be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ beo ba wose te bee dii akɛrɛɛ laŋ nɛ gyaŋ. Ba nyeeya ta yem ŋgba nyeela te ba moowɔ do boalaŋ man nyakee ŋa nɛ.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Bɛɛ tɔ balaŋ gbɛɛ nyi be na yale ya, te bɛɛ yako wɔ bela nyi be na di weenɛɛ ŋaale ya. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ weenɛɛ bo nyi balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ e di te ba gyeŋ anokoare keŋ nɛ, baa fane fa e karaŋ na baa di.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Nawolo nyi kpene kamasɛ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ na ke dei, te akpaa nyi de fane fa e karaŋ na tekaboena nyi dɛɛ bɛɛ ŋa ya.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan na kefane keŋ te desina ŋa.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Akpaa n mo mena nombia kɛŋa wola Kristotena na, n ke yɛɛ Yesu Kristo tobaale kpaakpaate ŋon bɔɔ mo kelɛɛdi na kawola kpaakpaate keŋ n silana nɛ kɛɛle e nɛ.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Lese n wose lee ŋɔla nombia na kawola ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ man, na n ke sila Wurubuarɛ ɔsom kpaakpaate keŋ gbɛɛ nideli na ka ke male neŋ.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Nawolo nyi wose kewɔŋee dana tɔnɔɔ kyomii bo fa deniwalaŋ. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ ɔsom dana tɔnɔɔ nombia pou man, nawolo nyi kɛɛ fa nyeedoŋ gyɛŋ te kɛɛ fa nyeedoŋ kekpaakekpaa debaŋ keŋ gyae ke kɔŋ nɛ man.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ ampaŋ, te kaboena nyi dɛɛ lɛɛ ŋa di nideli.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Kei dɔɔ te dɛɛ kyaŋ da wose yɛɛ tom nideli debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi de loo gyakaa Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ dɔɔ. Ŋon yɛna balaŋ pou nyeelɛɛre, tuturu na balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ lɛɛ e di nɛ.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Wola wɔ mena nombia kɛŋa, na n ke kɛɛ nyi walaŋ kamasɛ te kasee ŋa nideli.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Na yeli ŋolo na ŋolo ke kɛɛ neŋ nyi n yɛɛ bu e ya, mɔna yela n kekolosi na n dinɔɔ na n balaŋ kegyae na n kelɛɛdi na n kekyaa keŋ ayimɛɛ be doo n wose man ya nɛ, ka bese kolo kekasee fa balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di nɛ.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Pɛte maa kɔŋ na, mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ mo n debaŋ na n doŋ kala Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan balaŋ man, na n ke yako wɔ nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan, na n kawola wɔ ŋe man nideli.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Mo Wurubuarɛ kolo anefaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra be yako ke nombia, debaŋ keŋ kegyiise ba mo ba nyiŋmaase gyakaa n dɔɔ te n be nyim nɛ yɛɛ tom nideli.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ di mena nombia kɛŋa pou dɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ na n ka mo n wose fa ŋa, na balaŋ kenyiŋ naa n siaman kegyu na n nombia ŋan n ne yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Kɛɛ n dinɔɔ na n kawola man nideli. Yɛɛ kakyeŋ di ŋe dɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ. Akpaa n yɛɛ mena na, n ke lɛɛ ɛmɛɛ na baŋ bee tei neŋ nɛ pou nyee.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Akpaa n ne kolosi na baala kegyiise nɛ, na fae wɔ ŋgba nya akoso nɛ ya mɔna kolosi na wɔ ŋgba n kyaɔ nɛ. Kolosi na tewulɛɛ mɔ ŋgba n kegyiise yaa n naabia nɛ.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: Kolosi na ala kegyiise ŋgba n naɔ nɛ, na n ke kolosi na alebia ŋgba n desina nɛ, keŋ n ba gyueŋ ba wose man agyueŋ kum kamasɛ ya.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Kaboena nyi nya lese n konɔɔ man tela liala baŋ bɔɔ taŋ baŋ baa kɛɛ be dɔɔ ya nɛ, na n ka mo obuo mɔ fa wɔ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Mɔna akpaa lialo ŋolo dana bia yaa naanasebia nɛ, kaboena nyi bia yaa naanasebia baŋ baa tela e nideli na ka lese be Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nombia ŋan bɔɔ kasee nɛ wola. Be yɛɛ mena nɛ, na bɛɛ tɔ be kyaɔ na be naanaɔ kom baa nawolo nyi mena te Wurubuarɛ ne gyae.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Lialo ŋon ɔ kyaa ɔ wose dɔɔ keŋ ɔ be dana walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne kɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ ya nɛ, ɔ na mo ɔ loo pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ bo. Mena dɔɔ nelim na ka weese pou na ɔ gyakaa ɔ ne fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyi waa kɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Mɔna lialo ŋon ɔ ne gyae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyoŋ kedi nɛ dɔɔ ɔ dɔŋ bo yakaa keŋ ɔ be dana nyeedoŋ ya.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Kolosi nombia kɛŋa fa Kristotena baŋ, na ŋolo be nyiŋ nombiikum daale yako lee ba wose man ya.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Nyi akpaa ŋolo bɛɛ tale kɛɛ ɔ loŋtona dɔɔ ya, tuturu na ŋon gbagba ɔ denimantena dɔɔ ya nɛ, na nawolo baa nyi ɔ te tina ɔ Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ yela. Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ gba kela walaŋ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ ya.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Lialo ŋon ɔ te dii ta kela kulutooneŋ sɔŋotooro ya na, be na kala e kpu liala dikpii keŋ man ya. Kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ alo ŋon ɔ be kyaa baale dokoloŋ gyaŋ, keŋ ɔ ta lee ɔ baale ŋonaŋ wɔle ya.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon balaŋ na lese ɔ yele lee ɔ nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ man, na mena keŋ ɔ be tale kɛɛle ɔ bia nideli te ɔ ne lɛɛ ŋɔɔla te ɔ ne kɛɛ be dɔɔ nideli mɔ nɛ. Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ balaŋ te ɔ ne kɛɛ be dɔɔ nideli, te ɔ ne yɛɛ deeli fa baŋ ba wose be kyaŋ wɔ mɔ nɛ. Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne nyiŋ debaŋ yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Liala baŋ ba te ŋmɛɛ ta ya nɛ, na kala wɔ kpu mena liala dikpii kei man ya. Nawolo nyi yale de gyɔ wɔ loo kela ba kelɛɛdi keŋ na, baa lee Yesu Kristo wɔle na be kaa yala bela.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: Nyi akpaa be yɛɛ mena na, Wurubuarɛ waa bu wɔ fɔɔ nawolo nyi ba te yala ntam keŋ bɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ kaŋ fa Kristo nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Kenaŋ wɔle na, bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ ba debaŋ yakaa na be dɔŋ na akpaŋalaŋ akpaŋalaŋ. Kei wɔle na, bɛɛ kolosi balaŋ wose man nombia na be dana ba wose bɛɛ yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋan tekaboena nyi baa yɛɛ ya nɛ, te bɛɛ kolosi nombia ŋan tekaboena nyi baa kolosi ya nɛ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Lee mena dɔɔ mɛɛ gyae nyi liala baŋ be yɛɛ alebiawɔ nɛ, baa yala na baa lola bia na baa kɛɛ ba akpaŋalaŋse dɔɔ nideli. Be yɛɛ mena na, de kɔlala baŋ be gyae baa nyiŋ nombiikum kamasɛ kolosi lee da wose man ya.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Nawolo nyi liala baale taŋ lee Wurubuarɛ wɔle gyu be silana ɔbɔnsam.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Nyi akpaa Kristo alo ŋolo dana liala ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ, kaboena nyi waa kɛɛ be dɔɔ keŋ ɔ na mo wɔ lɔ Kristotena baŋ dɔɔ ya. Na Kristotena baŋ ke nyiŋ kɛɛ liala baŋ bɔɔ taŋ baŋ baa kɛɛ be dɔɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Kristotena kegyiise baŋ be yɛɛ siamantenawɔ te bɛɛ yɛɛ ba tom nideli nɛ, kaboena nyi baa bu wɔ nideli. Tuturu na kegyiise baŋ bɛɛ kyaŋ ba wose kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te bɛɛ wola balaŋ ŋe man nideli nɛ.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ne yako daa nyiaa, Wonembu ŋon ɔ ne tuku amɔla nɛ, bɔɔ ne bake ɔ nɔɔ ya. Mena mɔ te walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ tom na, kaboena nyi baa tɔ e kom.

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Nyi akpaa ŋolo da mo nombiikum daale gyakaa kegyia ŋolo dɔɔ nɛ, ɛ na lɛɛ ke do ya. Gyisɛ ɛ be nyiŋ adansɛɛtena bala yaa batooro pɛna ɛ ke lɛɛ ke do.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ nɛ, ɛ lese si wɔ balaŋ nsana na gyakoloŋ ke nyiŋ gyoo balaŋ akaŋ baŋ mɔ.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: Mɛɛ faree neŋ nideli lee Wurubuarɛ na Yesu Kristo na ɔ kpilala baŋ ɔ ba lese wɔ nɛ siaman nyiaa, kɛɛ nyi n te di mmaraase kɛŋa dɔɔ keŋ nyi n be gyae ŋolo kela ŋolo ya.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Na barase na n nyiŋmaa ka mo gyakaa balaŋ dɔɔ bileŋbileŋ nyi n na lese wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tom ya, te na mo n wose do balaŋ nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ man ya. Tela n wose nideli keŋ nyi n be yɛɛ nombiikum ya.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Lee n tɔɔ kawee na n kɛɛ wee bileŋbileŋ keŋ dɔɔ nɛ, na tekaa nyɔɔ loŋ kaageŋ ya mɔna nyɔɔ soloŋ kyomii kyomii.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Balaŋ baale wui nombiakumɛɛ na lee debɔɔ bileŋ pɛna baa di be nombia. Mɔna baale wui nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ ŋa weesɛɛ bo, wɔle wɔle pɛte na lee debɔɔ.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Mena mɔ te nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ bɛɛ weese ya. Ŋan ŋa weesɛɛ koraŋ nɛ, ŋe gyae kaa lee debɔɔ.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ doo balaŋ tɛɛ nɛ, ɛ mo obuo fa ɛ gbeŋgyoona lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na ŋolo be nyiŋ kolosi nombiikum lee Wurubuarɛ na de kawola keŋ wose man ya.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Nyi akpaa ŋolo ɔ gbeŋgyoo yɛɛ Kristo baale e nɛ, ɔ na kɛɛ nyi keŋ be popou yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ dɔɔ ɔ be bu e nideli ya. Keŋ gba te kaboena nyi waa mo obuo fa e nideli nawolo nyi baŋ bee di ba tom tɔnɔɔ nɛ, be yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ te bɛɛ gyae be nombia mɔ. Mena nombia kɛŋa te kaboena nyi nya wola wɔ na n ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na baa di ŋe dɔɔ.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ na wola nombia kpoo ŋan ŋɔɔ ne kyaa na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kawola keŋ na Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nombia ya nɛ.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: na mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne gyina ɔ wose adido te ɔ ba gyeŋ daale mɔ ya. Aŋmaareŋ kum na kale nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ doo la ɔ kawola keŋ man. Kɛŋa na moona nombiakumɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ kekɔla na aŋmaareŋ kelɛɛ na daaworo na ɔmanso na balaŋ katee na nyeeman ditiŋtɛɛ na dɔŋa kekɔla nɛ kɔŋ.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ nyeeya ta yekee, mena dɔɔ te debaŋ kamasɛ na be dana nombia bɛɛ wɔŋee na dɔŋa. Anokoare be doo be man ya. Baŋ gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ ɔsom yɛɛ gbɛɛ keŋ baa mo nyiŋ kɔba.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Nyi akpaa kyomii keŋ n dana te n yela ke da gyoo n sia na, Wurubuarɛ ɔsom dana tɔnɔɔ nideli fa neŋ.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Nawolo nyi de ta mo kolo kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya, mena mɔ te dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ mo kolo lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyu ya.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Mɔna nyi akpaa de dana weenɛɛ na abɔɔ ŋan dɛɛ do na, kaboena nyi ŋe dɛɛ gyoo de sia.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ gyae kɔba beiŋ nɛ ne yale kekɛɛsekɛɛ na ɔbɔnsam kɔta man, te ne yeli bɛɛ yɛɛ abɔɔ nkaraŋkaraŋ na be ta yoo lee Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ man na ba te wɔlɛɛ kekpaakekpaa.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Nyi walaŋ de yase ɔ sia do kɔba kegyae dɔɔ beiŋ man na, na mo e gyu dukum man. Baale te sila kɔba kegyae beiŋ kei te be tinaa ba kelɛɛdi keŋ yela, te ba moo ba wose do kayeyɛɛ dinaa man.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Mɔna nyaŋ Wurubuarɛ walaŋ dɔɔ yeu lee mena nombia kɛŋa pou man, na n ke sila nombia ŋan ŋa tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman nɛ na Wurubuarɛ ɔsom kpaakpaate, na nombia ŋan n be lɛɛ di nɛ na balaŋ kegyae na n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ, na n ke bu n wose debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Yoo keŋ n ne yoo nyi keŋ n be lɛɛ Kristo di dɔɔ nɛ, seŋ keŋkeŋ na n ke yoo ke nideli na n ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ. Kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ lɔɔ yele baake neŋ, debaŋ keŋ n be gyuusu n nɔɔ kolosi n kelɛɛdi keŋ nombia balaŋ burum siaman nɛ.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: Ma seŋɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa kpene kamasɛ nyeedoŋ nɛ, na Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ be di Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan adansɛɛ kegyia Pɔntiɔse Pilato gyaŋ nyi ŋe yɛɛ anokoare nɛ siaman mɛɛ yako neŋ nyiaa.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: kɛɛ na n kedi mmaraase kɛŋa dɔɔ. Na kyɛɛkee ŋa ya, na n ke kɛɛ nyi ŋolo mɔ be nyiŋ nombiikum daale yako lee n wose ya, kelii wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Wurubuarɛ waageŋ kaboela nyi dɛɛ lese ɔ yele. Nawolo nyi ŋon waageŋ yɛna doŋ pou nyee, na gyooneŋ pou Gyoo na gbeŋgyoona pou Gbeŋgyoo. Ŋon ne gyae la waa yela Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ wee keŋ ŋon gbagba ba see nɛ man.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: Ŋon waageŋ kyaa la kekpaakekpaa te ɔ bɛɛ yem ya, te ɔ kyaa keŋmaŋee keŋ walaŋ bɛɛ tale benaa ke ya nɛ man. Ŋon te walaŋ te naa ta e see ya, te ŋolo mɔ be gyae waa tale naa e ya. Ŋon danaana doŋ keŋ be taŋ ɔto ya, te ɔ kaboena nyi baa lese ɔ yele debaŋ kamasɛ. Amɛn.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Faree balaŋ baŋ be dana ba wose tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ nyi be na gyina ba wose adido ya te be na mo be loo gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan be dana nɛ dɔɔ ya, nawolo nyi ŋɔɔ gyae ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa ya. Mɔna kaboena nyi baa mo be loo pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa daa abɔɔ pou te ne yɛɛ daa gyoŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Faree wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ deeli, na baa yela be deeli keyɛɛ keŋ ka bo. Baa yɛɛ wɔe na baa nyiŋ tale mo ba abɔɔ ŋan be dana nɛ ŋaale fa balaŋ.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Nyi akpaa be yɛɛ kɛŋa na, bɛɛ yɛɛ bo see ba wose wee daale. Kei man te baa tale mo nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: Timoti, kɛɛ kpene keŋ bɔɔ mo do n nyiŋmaa man nɛ dɔɔ nideli. Lese n wose lee afa kumɛɛ keyɔɔ na aŋmaareŋ yakaa yakaa ŋan balaŋ ne baake nyi nyansa nombia nɛ man.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: Nawolo nyi balaŋ baale kpa be dana mena nyansa kei, mena dɔɔ te yeli be ta yoo lee ba kelɛɛdi man. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon. Amɛn.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl gyaŋ. Mɛɛ ŋmarase ke mee yelee nyaŋ me bu gyaagyi Timoti. Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii man te ɔ lese maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ Yesu Kristo kpilale. Ɔ kpila maŋ nyi maa gyu ke yako nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan ɔ be yako see nyi dee nyiŋ lee daa na Yesu Kristo dokoloŋ keyɛɛ man dɔɔ nɛ fa balaŋ. De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele neŋ, na baa wii n waraŋase na baa fa neŋ wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane na, mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ te mɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ mɔ karaŋ. Mɛɛ som e lee me konɔɔ kpaakpaa man ŋgba mena keŋ me naanaɔ be yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: Mɛɛ tɔɔse debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ tina neŋ yela te n be wii nɛ. Mena dɔɔ me loo gyakaa nyi maa naa neŋ na me wɔe ke fɛɛ maŋ.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: Mɛɛ tɔɔse mena keŋ n ba mo n konɔɔ pou lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di ŋgba mena keŋ n naana alo Lɔise na n naa Yunisi be lɛɛ di nɛ. Ma gyeŋ mɔ nyi nyaŋ mɔ n sɛɛ n dana mena kelɛɛdi kenaŋ.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ nyiaa, kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa neŋ debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ mo me nyiŋmaa gyakaa n dɔɔ nɛ, kɛɛ na n ke kyaŋ ke nideli keŋ kɔɔ lee n nyiŋmaa man ya.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te fa daa feliŋ ŋon gyae ka do daa gyakoloŋ ya. Mɔna feliŋ ŋon gyae ka do daa doŋ te kee yeli, dɛɛ gyae balaŋ te kee yeli dɛɛ tale di da wose dɔɔ nɛ te ɔ faa daa.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Na yeli desɛŋ ke kyaŋ neŋ lee de Gbeŋgyoo nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan keyako man ya. Mena mɔ te na yeli desɛŋ ke kyaŋ neŋ nyi ba te kyaŋ maŋ do deni man ya. Mɔna lee Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ, nyaŋ mɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kena diyem nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan keyako man ŋgba maŋ nɛ.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Ŋon Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ na da nyee, te ɔ baake daa nyi de kaa bese ɔ bia. Na de nombia ŋan dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ te ɔ baake daa ya, mɔna lee mena keŋ ŋon gbagba be wulaa yako see dɔɔ te ɔ boele daa. Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ɔ bu Yesu Kristo dɔɔ mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ kei boele daa pɛte ɔ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ɔ ta lese ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ wola lee da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo kekɔŋ man. Ŋon diina yeŋ dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ nyeekelɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dɔɔ wola daa gbɛɛ keŋ dɛɛ mo nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Wurubuarɛ lese na maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ ɔ kpilale na maa ta kolosi na maa wola ɔ nombia ŋan.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Lee kei dɔɔ te mɛɛ naa diyem ma anenaaŋ kei. Mɔna desɛŋ be dana maŋ ya, nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ walaŋ ŋon mɔɔ lɛɛ e di. Te mɛɛ lɛɛ di nideli mɔ nyi waa tale kɛɛ kpene keŋ mɔɔ mo do e ɔ nyiŋmaa maŋ nɛ dɔɔ nideli kelii wee keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Tela nombia kpaakpaa ŋan n be nyii lee me gyaŋ nɛ nideli, na n ka mo ŋa yɛɛ gbɛɛ keŋ nyaŋ ke sila. Tela kelɛɛdi na balaŋ kegyae keŋ dɔɔ nyim lee Kristo Yesu dɔɔ nɛ nideli.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Tela kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ doo de man ba do n nyiŋmaa man nɛ nideli.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: N gyeŋ nyi Kristotena baŋ bɔɔ lee Esia tɛɛle man nɛ pou te bɛɛ maŋ. Be man baale yɛna Figeluse na Hɛmogenese.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Mɔna Onesiforuse dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa wii ŋon na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋmantena pou waraŋase, nawolo nyi ɔ ne yeli ma wose ne fɛɛ maŋ te bɛɛ yɛɛ e desɛŋ gba nyi ba te kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni ya.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: Kenaŋ wɔle koraŋ na ɔ ka gyoo Roman donɔɔ man na ɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ kɛo maŋ kaboena ɔ naa maŋ.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa yela de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ke wii ɔ waraŋase ɔ wee dinaa keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ man. N gyeŋ mena keŋ ɔ be kyɔ maŋ lee gbɛɛneŋ burum man debaŋ keŋ me kyaa Efeso donɔɔ man nɛ.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Mena dɔɔ me bu Timoti, sola Wurubuarɛ na waa ta Yesu Kristo bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ yela n ka seŋ keŋkeŋ.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Nombia ŋan mɔɔ wola neŋ balaŋ burum siaman nɛ, mo ŋa do balaŋ baŋ n ne lɛɛ wɔ di nɛ nyiŋmaa man, na baŋ mɔ ke tale mo wola balaŋ wɔlɛɛ.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: N nyiŋa n yɛɛ Yesu Kristo yoonɔɔte kpaakpaate e nɛ, yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kena diyem ŋgba daa nɛ.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Yoonɔɔte ŋolo be kyaa keŋ nyi akpaa ɔ kyaa ɔ tom man na, ɔ na bese mo ɔ nɔɔ ka do balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋ nombia man ya. Mɔna ɔ ne yɛɛ kpene keŋ gyae ka gyoo ɔ kegyia ŋon sia bo.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Mena mɔ te akpaa ŋolo ne yeu te ɔ te di keyeu keŋ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ ya na, ɔ be gyae waa nyiŋ yele keyeu keŋ man ya.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Wɔɔfarale ŋon ɔ yɛɛ ɔ tom nideli na, ŋon te kaboena nyi waa taŋgbɛɛ di ɔ wɔɔ keŋ man weenɛɛ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Gyueŋ nombia ŋan mɛɛ yako neŋ nɛ man, nawolo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo waa yela n ke nyii nombia ŋenaŋ pou man nideli.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Na wolee Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ ba lee gyoo Defidi loŋtoro man, te Wurubuarɛ be gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ nombia ya. Kei yɛna Wurubuarɛ nombii kpaakpaa keŋ me dɔŋ mee kolosi nɛ.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: Keŋ mɔ dɔɔ te mɛɛ naa diyem, te be kyaŋa maŋ ketɔ deni te ba doo maŋ agbaraagbaraase ŋgba nombiakumɛɛyɛɛre nɛ. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ, ŋolo be tale do ŋa agbaraagbaraase ya.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Kei dɔɔ te mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ me diyem kena man lee balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ be wulaa lese wɔ see nɛ dɔɔ. Na Wurubuarɛ keta Yesu Kristo dɔɔ lɛɛ ba nyee na baŋ mɔ kenyiŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Nombia ŋan bɔɔ yako see nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ. Be yakowɔ nyi, Akpaa daa na Kristo ta yem na, daa na e dɛɛ kyaa bela.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Akpaa de yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ da diyem kena man na, dee kpu na e di gyoori. Te akpaa de bɛɛ e na, ŋon mɔ waa bɛɛ daa.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Akpaa daa bɛɛ lɛɛ di ya na, ŋon dɔɔ waa di ɔ nombia dɔɔ nawolo nyi ɔ bɛɛ yako nombii bese lee ke wɔle ya.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ na tɔɔse Kristotena baŋ nombia kɛŋa na n ke faree wɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman nyiaa, baa tina nombia kewɔŋee yela nawolo nyi ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya. Mɔna ŋɛɛ wɔlɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bee tei wɔ nɛ bo.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n ke nyiŋ yele Wurubuarɛ siaman, ŋgba tomyɛɛre kpaakpaate ŋon ɔ bee di desɛŋ ɔ tom keyɛɛ man ya nɛ. Kaboena nyi nya tale wola nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan ŋe yɛɛ anokoare nombia ŋa nɛ man nideli.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Lese n wose lee nombia ŋan ŋa te yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii ya nɛ afa keyɔɔ man. Nawolo nyi ŋɛɛ desina bo wɔlɛɛ walaŋ na Wurubuarɛ nsana.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Ba afa ŋan bɛɛ yɔɔ nɛ, ne yaasee bo ŋgba kawee kum nɛ. Balaŋ benaŋ man baale yɛna Hameneyose na Filetuse.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ ta yoo lee anokoare gbɛɛ keŋ man. Bɛɛ wola balaŋ nyi debaŋ keŋ balaŋ baa foŋ lee yeŋ man nɛ taŋ ke kɔŋ laŋ, mena dɔɔ ba te yeli baale ta lee wɔle ba kelɛɛdi man wɔlɛɛ.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ anokoare keŋ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ keŋ nyi kolo be tale wosi ke ya. Nombia kɛŋa te ba moowɔ tɔ ke nɔɔ. Nombia ŋenaŋ yɛna nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ gyeŋ balaŋ baŋ be yɛɛ ɔ wui. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ be lɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu di na, kaboena nyi waa lese ɔ wose lee nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ man.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Dekpaŋalaŋ dinaa kamasɛ man na, be dana kuruwaase kpookpoo. Kɔba yayam na kɔba wolom wui doo, te ŋan bɔɔ mo tɛɛle na daase yɛɛ ŋa mɔ nɛ doo. Bɛɛ mo ŋaale do weenɛɛ debaŋ kamasɛ, te bɛɛ mo ŋaale bo see daa wee dinaa.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Mena mɔ te nyaŋ walaŋ ŋon n lese n wose lee nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ man na, Wurubuarɛ waa mo neŋ yɛɛ kolo kpaakpaa. Nawolo nyi nyaŋ walaŋ ŋonaŋ wose taŋ ayimɛɛ ya. N wose dana tɔnɔɔ fa n Gbeŋgyoo te n te desina n wose fa tom kpaakpaa kamasɛ keyɛɛ.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Mena dɔɔ lese n wose lee lookum keŋ ne yele alebia na tewulɛɛ ne wɔlɛɛ nɛ man. Ɛmɛɛ na baŋ bɛɛ mo konɔɔ kpaakpaate som Wurubuarɛ nɛ ɛ mo ɛ loo gyakaa nombia ŋan tenɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ, na ɛ ka seŋ nombia ŋan ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ dɔɔ nideli na ɛ ke gyae dɔŋa na ɛ ke yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Lese n wose lee aŋmaareŋ ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ man, nawolo nyi n gyeŋ nyi ŋɛɛ mo kale bo kɔŋ.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Tekaboena nyi de Gbeŋgyoo tobaale waa mo ɔ wose do kale nombia man korakora ya. Mɔna kaboena bo nyi waa yɛɛ deeli fa walaŋ kamasɛ, na waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kawola, te ɔ ne nyiŋ konɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: Kaboena nyi waa nyiŋ konɔɔ na waa kolosi fa balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ e aŋmaareŋ nɛ. Na waa gyakaa loo nyi mberem Wurubuarɛ waa yela baa kyɛɛkee be konɔɔse, na baa gyeŋ anokoare keŋ.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: Kei gyae ke yela be sia ke ŋmaŋee wɔ, na baa yeu lee ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ be di be dɔɔ te ɔ ne yeli bɛɛ yɛɛ ɔ kegyaebii nɛ kɔta man.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Me bu Timoti, tɔɔse nyi tɛɛle kei da benaa kɔ ɔto nɛ kayeyɛɛ gyae kekɔŋ.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Nawolo nyi balaŋ baa gyae baŋ baageŋ wui bo na kɔba kegyae, na baa gyina ba wose adido na baa wola ba wose na baa tee balaŋ yakaa yakaa. Baa yɛɛ deŋele doŋ ba lolala dɔɔ te baa yɛɛ boniayɛtena te bɔɔ gyae baa gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: Balaŋ kegyae be gyae ke doo be man ya, te bɔɔ gyae baa mo nombia kyɛɛ ya. Baa tao balaŋ kelabere te bɔɔ gyae baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ ya. Baa yɛɛ akpanyaŋnyaŋ te bɔɔ gyae baa gyae kolo kpaakpaa mɔ ya.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: Baa lese dɔŋa fa na baa barase yɛɛ abɔɔ. Baa gyina ba wose adido beiŋ na baa gyae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyoŋ kedi kela Wurubuarɛ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: Baa gyae Wurubuarɛ ɔsom keŋ nombia na be sia, mɔna be konɔɔse man na bɔɔ ne lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ di ya. Mena dɔɔ lese n wose lee mena balaŋ benaŋ man.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Mena balaŋ benaŋ baale dɔŋɛɛ la na akpaŋalaŋ akpaŋalaŋ bɛɛ beo ala baŋ bɔɔ ne tale kyaŋ ba wose ya te nombiakumɛɛ be wulu wɔ, te lookum dɔɔ bee sila gbɛɛ kum kamasɛ nɛ.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Debaŋ kamasɛ na mena balaŋ kɛwɔ ne kasee nombia, mɔna bɔɔ gyae baa gyeŋ anokoare keŋ ya.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Mena keŋ Gyanese na Gyamberese ba seŋ tia Mosesi nɛ, mena ke yaa balaŋ kɛwɔ mɔ na sem tia anokoare nombia ŋan. Be yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ba nyeeya man nombia be wɔlɛɛ te bɔɔ dana daseŋae kelɛɛdi keŋ man ya.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: Mɔna bɔɔ gyae baa lii lem ya te be diyiŋ nombia ŋan gyae ka lee debɔɔ, na walaŋ kamasɛ kena ŋgba mena keŋ be yɛɛ Gyanese na Gyamberese nɛ.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ n gyeŋ me kawola na me dinɔɔ na nombia ŋan dɔɔ ma seŋɛɛ nɛ, na ma kelɛɛdi na me konɔɔ kenyiŋ na me balaŋ kegyae na me kakyeŋ keŋ me dana.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: na mena keŋ bɔɔ naase maŋ diyem, na diyem keŋ mɔɔ naa Antiɔke na Ikonium na Listra donɔɔse man, na mena keŋ mɔɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ diyem keŋ bɔɔ naase maŋ nɛ man. Mɔna de Gbeŋgyoo lese maŋ lee nombia kɛŋa pou man.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako neŋ n ke nyii nyiaa, walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne gyae nyi waa yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele man nɛ, balaŋ baa naase e diyem.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: Te balaŋ kumɛɛ na baŋ bɛɛ beo balaŋ nɛ, baa bese yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ kpu. Baa beo balaŋ na balaŋ mɔ ka beo wɔ.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ kyaŋ kpene keŋ n be kasee te n be lɛɛdi nɛ man nideli, nawolo nyi n gyeŋ balaŋ baŋ gyaŋ n be kasee mena nombia ŋenaŋ lee.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Nawolo nyi leenaŋ n biatɛɛ te n wulaa kasee Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan gyae ke yela n ka gyeŋ nyansa na n ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ lee Yesu Kristo kelɛɛdi man nɛ.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan pou lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ, te ŋe dei fa nombia kawola na nombia kalese si walaŋ, na nombia kedesina na mena keŋ n ka wola walaŋ kolo lee Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii man.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: Kei gyae ke yela Wurubuarɛ walaŋ ŋon ke desina ɔ wose nideli, na waa tale yɛɛ tom kpaakpaate kamasɛ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nyi waa yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: Timoti, tɔɔse nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man na ɔ kaa di balaŋ baŋ be kyaa na be sia, na baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ pou nombia. Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ faree neŋ nideli lee Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo siaman nyiaa.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan fa balaŋ. Yɛɛ kakyeŋ kolosi ŋa debaŋ kamasɛ. Kolosi fa wɔ na n ka wola wɔ gbɛɛ keŋ kaboena nyi baa mo, na n ka lese nombiakumɛɛ ŋan balaŋ ne yɛɛ nɛ si wɔ, na n ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na n ke nyiŋ konɔɔ fa wɔ lee n kawola keŋ man.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Nawolo nyi debaŋ daale gyae kekɔŋ keŋ balaŋ baa bɛɛ nyi bɔɔ tei nombia kpaakpaa ŋan ya. Te lee mena keŋ ba deŋela man na toree wɔ dɔɔ nɛ, baa ta yilaa akɛrɛɛ wolala na be kaa kolosi nombia ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae nyi baa nyii nɛ fa wɔ.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Baa bɛɛ anokoare keŋ kenyii, na baa tei ŋɔla nombia.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: Mɔna nyaŋ Timoti dɔɔ, yela n sia ke doo tɛɛle man na n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ diyem kamasɛ man. Yɛɛ tom keŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kolosire ne yɛɛ nɛ, na n ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom tom keŋ nideli kelii ɔto.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: Nawolo nyi maŋ Pɔɔl dɔɔ, ma debaŋ te lii nyi baa kyɛɛkee me fatabo leki ŋgba mena keŋ bee deesi te bɛɛ toosi soloŋ woli nɛ. Ma debaŋ te lii nyi maa lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: Ma te yoo yoo kpaakpaa keŋ taŋ, te ma te yeu keyeu keŋ mɔ kelii ɔto. Ma te kyaŋ ma kelɛɛdi keŋ man mɔ kelii ɔto.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Mena dɔɔ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ ne di nombia na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ, te desina gyooro kotɔtɔɔ keŋ nawolo nyi me gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ nɛ see na waa mo tɔ maŋ kom. Na maageŋ te waa yɛɛ mena fa ya, mɔna baŋ pou bee gyeki ɔ kabese kɔŋ nɛ mɔ kpuɛ.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Timoti, yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kekɔŋ me gyaŋ bileŋ.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: nawolo nyi keŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae loo doo Demase man dɔɔ nɛ, ɔ te tina maŋ yela laŋ Tesalonika donɔɔ man. Kiresɛnse te lam Galatia donɔɔ man, te Tituse mɔ te lam Dalematia donɔɔ man.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Luka waageŋ kyaa la me gyaŋ. N ne kɔŋ na mo Maake kpu na n wose kɔŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ ne kyɔ maŋ ma Wurubuarɛ tom keyɛɛ man.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: Me te kpila Tikikuse nyi waa gyu Efeso donɔɔ man.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Akpaa n ne kɔŋ na, mo ma kegba wurikyim keŋ mɔɔ tina yela Kapuse gyaŋ Torase donɔɔ man nɛ na me tɔna ŋan kɔna maŋ. Tuturu na mo tɔna ŋan bɔɔ mo wonembu tɔne yɛɛ ŋa nɛ kɔna maŋ.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Alɛkesanda ŋon ɔ yɛɛ luure e nɛ, te yɛɛ maŋ nombiikum daale. De Gbeŋgyoo waa tɔ e kom lee nombiikum keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ maŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: Mena dɔɔ kɛɛ n wose man nideli na e, nawolo nyi ɔ bɛɛ gyae de nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ korakora ya.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: Me nombia kedi gyaŋgbate keŋ man nɛ walaŋ na walaŋ ta sem me wɔle ya, be popou bɛɛ maŋ bo. Mɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ nyi ɔ na mo mena nombia kɛŋa tɔ wɔ kom ya.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: Mɔna de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu seŋawɔ me wɔle, te ɔ doo maŋ kakyeŋ te me kolosi ɔ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa baŋ pou ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, te be nyiiwɔ te Wurubuarɛ lese maŋ lee yeŋ man.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Mena dɔɔ de Gbeŋgyoo waa lese maŋ lee dukum kamasɛ man, na waa mo maŋ gyu ɔ gyoori keŋ man adido wosefɛɛreŋ man. Ŋon te kaboena nyi baa lese ɔ yele kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Mɛɛ do Pirisila na Akuila na Onesiforuse na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋmantena pou nɔɔ.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: Erasituse kyaa Korinto donɔɔ man, te me te tina Tirofimuse ŋon ɔ na wee nɛ yela Miletuse donɔɔ man.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kekɔŋ pɛna waare debaŋ keŋ kelii. Ubuluse na Pudense na Linuse na Klɔɔdia na de tebia Kristotena baŋ pou na do neŋ nɔɔ.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa kpu na neŋ, na Wurubuarɛ ka mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele ŋon.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Wurubuarɛ tobaale Pɔɔl ŋon me yɛɛ Yesu Kristo kpilale e nɛ gyaŋ. Wurubuarɛ lesena maŋ nyi me kaa kyɔ balaŋ baŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba ba lese wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ, na baa seŋ ba kelɛɛdi man keŋkeŋ na maa wola wɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ, na baa gyeŋ ŋa kpu nideli. Nombia kɛŋa kagyeŋ ne gyae la ke tale yela balaŋ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: Kei gyae ke yela baa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ. Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ bee di dekara ya nɛ, wulaa yakowɔ see leenaŋ kewalaŋ keŋ nyi dee nyiŋ mena nyeedoŋ kekpaa kei pɛte ɔ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: Mena dɔɔ debaŋ kpaakpaate keŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba ba see kelii nɛ, ɔ lese mena nombia kɛŋa debɔɔ. Da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa balaŋ pou nyeedoŋ nɛ, ŋon yako na mena nombia kɛŋa fa maŋ Pɔɔl nyi me kaa yako fa balaŋ pou.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: Mɛɛ ŋmarase tɔne kei mee yelee nyaŋ Tituse ŋon mɔɔ mo neŋ ŋgba me bu gbagba nɛ. Nawolo nyi Kristo te daa na neŋ pou lɛɛwɔ di. De kya Wurubuarɛ na da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele neŋ na baa fa neŋ wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Kpene keŋ dɔɔ te mɔɔ tina neŋ yela Kreti tɛɛle man yɛna nyi, mɛɛ gyae na n kenyiŋ desina abɔɔ ŋan be kaa na kedesina nɛ nideli, na n ka lese kegyiise fa donɔɔ kamasɛ ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ wola neŋ nɛ.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: Kaboena nyi Kristotena kegyia waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ wose man be dana nombiikum kamasɛ ya. Ɔ wɛɛle dɛɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Kaboena nyi ɔ bia mɔ baa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ Yesu di te bee bu balaŋ, te ba wose man be dana nombiikum daale keŋ balaŋ baa naa kolosi ya.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: Lee mena keŋ kegyia seŋɛɛ la Wurubuarɛ tom keŋ siaman dɔɔ nɛ, tekaboena nyi baa nyiŋ nombiikum kamasɛ lee ɔ wose man ya. Ɔ na yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ na wola ɔ wose yaa ɔ na gyeŋ baŋ bileŋbileŋ ya. Ɔ na yɛɛ soloŋnyɔɔre yaa walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne gyae kale yaa walaŋ ŋon ɔ sia ne yɛɛ kɔba dɔɔ beiŋ ya.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: Mɔna kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne lɛɛ ŋɔɔla, te ɔ ne gyae nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ. Kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ ɔ wose katela, te ɔ nombia ayɛɛsa mɔ doo na ke gbɛɛ. Kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ayimɛɛ be doo ɔ man ya te ɔ ne tale di ɔ wose dɔɔ.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: Kaboena nyi waa kyaŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ wolo nɛ man nideli. Kaboena nyi waa kyaŋ ŋa nideli na waa nyiŋ tale mo nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan wola balaŋ na ke gbɛɛ, na waa lese nombiakumɛɛ wolala baŋ nombiakumɛɛ si wɔ.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Nawolo nyi balaŋ burum ta koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan, te be dana be nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ bɛɛ beo balaŋ. Tuturu na Kristotena baŋ be yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ te be sɛɛ be dana baala wose kekara mmaraa keŋ man nɛ, ne yɛɛ na mena nombia kɛŋa.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: Kaboena nyi yaa tɔ wɔ mena nombia ŋenaŋ kawola, nawolo nyi be sɛɛ be dana nombia ŋan tekaboena nyi baa wola ya nɛ man. Kei te yeli akpaŋalaŋ akpaŋalaŋ man balaŋ burum ta yoo gbɛɛ lee kawola kpaakpaate keŋ man. Ke yɛɛ desɛŋ nombii ke, nawolo nyi kɔba kegyae dɔɔ te bɛɛ yɛɛ kɛŋa pou nɛ.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: Baŋ Kretitena benaŋ gbagba be kegyia ŋolo yako ba wose man nombia nyiaa, Kretitena yɛɛ akɛrɛɛtenawɔ. Be dana akpanyaŋnyaŋ ŋgba wonembu kum nɛ, te be yɛɛ kebɔŋaletena na diirawɔ.

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: Mena nombii keŋ ɔ be yako nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ, mena dɔɔ faree Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Kreti tɛɛle dɔɔ nɛ nideli nyi baa kyaŋ ba Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ man nideli.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: Na baa tina Gyudatena beneŋ nombia ŋan ŋa te yɛɛ ampaŋ ya, na balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ ne lɛɛ anokoare keŋ di ya nɛ mmaraase dɔɔ kedi yela.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Balaŋ baŋ ayimɛɛ be doo be man ya nɛ, kpene kamasɛ dei fa wɔ. Mɔna balaŋ baŋ ayimɛɛ doo be man te bɔɔ ne lɛɛ Kristo nombia ŋan di ya nɛ dɔɔ, kolo be kyaa keŋ ke dei fa wɔ ya. Nawolo nyi nombiakumɛɛ te di ba agyueŋ na be konɔɔ man nombia pou dɔɔ, te nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ mɔ be dana wɔ desɛŋ ya.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Bɛɛ gyɔ be konɔɔ yako nyi ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ, mɔna be nombia ayɛɛsa bɛɛ wolo nyi ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya. Be yɛɛ balaŋ kumɛɛwɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman te bɔɔ ne bu e ya. Ba tekaboena nombii kpaakpaa mɔ keyɛɛ ya.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Nyaŋ dɔɔ wola wɔ anokoare nombia ŋan ne kyaa na Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan nɛ.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Wola baala kegyiise baŋ nyi baa yela be sia kedoo tɛɛle man. Baa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ obuo doo ba wose man, na baa gyeŋ ba wose katela. Wola wɔ na baa lɛɛ anokoare nombia ŋan di, na baa gyae balaŋ lee be konɔɔse man na baa nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ ba kelɛɛdi keŋ man nideli.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Mena mɔ te wola ala kegyiise baŋ nyi baa kyaa ŋgba balaŋ baŋ bee yee Wurubuarɛ nɛ. Be na yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bee kolosi balaŋ wose man nombia ya, te be na yɛɛ soloŋnyɔɔra ya. Mɔna kaboena bo nyi baa wola nombia kpaakpaa.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Nyi akpaa be yɛɛ mena na, baa tale wola alebia mɔ na baa gyae be baala na be bia nombia.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: na baa gyeŋ ba wose katela keŋ bɔɔ wɔlɛɛ ba wose ya. Na baa yɛɛ ala yalala kpaakpaa nyibaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ deeli, te bɛɛ yɔkɔse ba wose fa be baala. Dekɔŋ mena na, ŋolo be gyae waa nyiŋ nombiikum daale kolosi lee Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan wose man ya.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Mena ke te do tewulɛɛ mɔ kakyeŋ na baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Kaboena nyi nya yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa abɔɔ pou man na balaŋ kena na baa kasee neŋ. N nombia kawola man na yela balaŋ kena nya anokoare na n sibiiyam.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: Kolosi nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ, na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ koro seŋ tia neŋ nɛ be nyiŋ nombiikum daale yako lee n wose man ya. Na desɛŋ ke nyiŋ kyaŋ wɔ nawolo nyi bɔɔ gyae baa nyiŋ nombiikum daale kolosi lee da wose man ya.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Wola tewulɛɛ na alebia nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose fa be gbeŋgyoona lee kpene kamasɛ man, na baa yɛɛ kpene keŋ gyae ka gyoo be gbeŋgyoona baŋ sia. Be na kolosi na be gbeŋgyoona baŋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ ya.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: Be na ŋmɛɛle be gbeŋgyoona baŋ kolo ya. Mɔna baa yɛɛ kpene keŋ gyae ke yela be gbeŋgyoona baŋ ke lɛɛ wɔ di nideli. Na be nombia ayɛɛsa pou ke yela da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan bɛɛ wolo nɛ kegyɔ balaŋ loo.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ ta lese ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ gyae ke yela balaŋ ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ nɛ wola balaŋ pou.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ kenaŋ na wola daa mena keŋ dee tina tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombia, na gbɛɛneŋ ŋan ŋa te yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ ya nɛ kesila yela. Na dɛɛ tale di da wose dɔɔ na de gbɛɛneŋ mɔ ka tenee Wurubuarɛ siaman, na dɛɛ kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii man.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ɛ yela dɛɛ yɛɛ mena debaŋ keŋ de kyaa dɛɛ daa Wurubuarɛ na da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man keŋ dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: Yesu moona ɔ wose fa nyi baa ko na waa mo tɔ da nyeeman kom lɛɛ daa lee de nombiakumɛɛ pou man. Na dɛɛ bese balaŋ baŋ de yɛɛ ŋon waageŋ wui, na waa desina daa na dɛɛ tale yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Mo n doŋ pou wola wɔ mena abɔɔ kɛŋa. Do baŋ bɛɛ yɔkɔse nɛ kakyeŋ, na n ka lese baŋ mɔ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ nɛ nombiakumɛɛ si wɔ. Na yela be man ŋolo ke kɛɛ neŋ nyi n yɛɛ bu e ya.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Tɔɔse Kristotena baŋ nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose fa gyooneŋ na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ kegyiise, na baa di kegyiise baŋ mmaraase dɔɔ, na baa doo ba wose dɔɔ na abɔɔ kpaakpaa nyiŋan keyɛɛ debaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: Kolosi fa wɔ nyi be na mo nombiikum gyakaa ŋolo dɔɔ ya mɔna baa yela baŋ na balaŋ nsana ke yɛɛ gyoŋ. Be na ŋmanyaŋ balaŋ ya te debaŋ kamasɛ mɔ na kaboena nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Nawolo nyi nafɔ gyaŋgba keŋ na daa mɔ yɛɛ ayiŋtenawɔ te de yɛɛ deŋele doŋ te da yoo gbɛɛ. Da abɔɔ ŋan dɛɛ gyae, na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae dii da nyeeya. Da kekyaabii man na, de dana agyueŋ kumɛɛ na sibii. Balaŋ kɔla daa te daa mɔ kɔla wɔ.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Mɔna debaŋ keŋ da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ ba lese ɔ deeli na ɔ balaŋ kegyae keŋ debɔɔ nɛ.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: ɔ lɛɛ da nyee. Kei te yɛɛ nyi daa gbagba tom kpaakpaa keŋ dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ te ɔ lɛɛ da nyee ya, mɔna ɔ wii de waraŋase bo te ɔ tɛɛwɔ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ saase de nombiakumɛɛ pou leki, te ɔ yela de dinɔɔ kyɛɛkeewɔ ŋgba ba bese yaa lola daa wɔle nɛ.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo dɔɔ yela ɔ feliŋ ŋon ka kyaawɔ de man nideli.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛwɔ mena na ke yela waa lɛɛ daa do, na dee nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaakekpaa keŋ de loo gyakaa ke dɔɔ nɛ, lee ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Mena nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ ampaŋ te mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke yase n sia wola ŋe man nideli. Kei gyae ke yela baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di nɛ ke kyaŋ ba wose yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa. Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋa, te ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Ɛ tina diyiŋ na aŋmaareŋ nombia yela. Ɛ tina ɛ lolo kegyakaare dɔɔ aŋmaareŋ kelɛɛ yela. Ɛ lese ɛ wose lee kale na aŋmaareŋ lee Gyudatena mmaraase ŋan wose man. Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa pou yɛɛ yakaa te ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ daale ya.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ doo ɛ man te ɔ na koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te ɔ na mo aŋmaareŋ do balaŋ man na, kolosi na e dokoloŋ yaa bola. Akpaa ɔ te nyii neŋ ya na, lese n wose lee ɔ man.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Gyeŋ nyi mena walaŋ kei dinɔɔ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛre e te ɔ bɛɛ gyae anokoare ya. Ŋon gbagba nombia ayɛɛsa ne buu na e fɔɔ.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: Maa kpila Atemase yaa Tikikuse n gyaŋ. Ɔ kɔŋ na yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kaa gyaŋee na maŋ Nikopolise donɔɔ man. Nawolo nyi ma te yɛɛ ma agyueŋ nyi maa kyaa botɔɔ waare tɛɛ.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n ke kyɔ Senase ŋon ɔ yɛɛ mmaraa wolale e nɛ na Apolo be gbɛɛ keta man, na n ke kɛɛ nyi baa nyiŋ kpene kamasɛ keŋ bɛɛ gyae.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Kaboena nyi daa Kristotena dɛɛ mo da debaŋ yɛɛ kolo kpaakpaa, na dɛɛ tale nyiŋ kolo kyɔ balaŋ na baa lee ba diyem man. Tekaboena nyi dɛɛ kyaa kehuhoori man ya.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa me gyaŋ kɛbo nɛ na do neŋ nɔɔ. Yako de gyoona baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo di te bɛɛ gyae daa nɛ nyi dɛɛ do wɔ nɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon me silana Yesu Kristo dɔɔ te bɔɔ kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni nɛ, na de gyoo Kristobaale Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee nyaŋ de gyoo gyaagyi Filemɔn ŋon daa na neŋ ne yɛɛ tom dokoloŋ nɛ.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: na Kristotena baŋ bɛɛ kyaa gyaŋee n dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ, na de gyoo Kristo alo Afia, na de gyoo Akipuse ŋon daa na e yɛɛ yoonɔɔtenawɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan keyako man nɛ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Me dɔɔ Filemɔn debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ ma kefane man na, mɛɛ fa me Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee n dɔɔ.

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: nawolo nyi me nyii mena keŋ n ne gyae Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ ɔ be baake wɔ te ɔ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ, na mena keŋ n be lɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu di nɛ.

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: Mɛɛ fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa kyɔ neŋ na n ke nyiŋ tale kolosi Kristo nombia ŋan n be lɛɛ di nɛ nideli, na ke yela n ka gyeŋ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan pou Wurubuarɛ be fa daa lee keŋ daa na Yesu yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ nɛ.

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: Me dɔɔ, n balaŋ kegyae keŋ na do maŋ kakyeŋ te kɛɛ yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ nideli, nawolo nyi kɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ ɔ be baake wɔ te ɔ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ kakyeŋ nideli.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: Kristo dɔɔ nafɔ me dana gbɛɛ nyi maa ŋere neŋ nyi nya yɛɛ kpene keŋ kaboena nyi nya yɛɛ nɛ.

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus.
local: Mɔna lee kegyae dɔɔ mɔɔ na ŋere neŋ ya, mɛɛ waase neŋ bo. Maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon ma seŋɛɛ Yesu nawɔɔ man te nɛnɛɛ me sɛɛ me doo deni man lee ŋon dɔɔ nɛ ne waase na neŋ nɛ.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: Me bu Onesimuse nombia yaa mɛɛ sola neŋ nɛ. Kristo dɔɔ ɔ ta bese me bu nawolo nyi me dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ lɛɛ Kristo di debaŋ keŋ bɔɔ kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni nɛ.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nafɔ ɔ be dana tɔnɔɔ daale fa neŋ ya, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ dana tɔnɔɔ fa daa na neŋ pou.

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: Nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ besena e baa nyi waa bese kɔŋ n gyaŋ. Ɔ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ nombia doo me konɔɔ man nideli.

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Nafɔ me gyaewɔ nyi waa kyaa n nawɔɔ man me gyaŋ kɛbo, na waa kyɔ maŋ debaŋ keŋ me doo deni man lee nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan keyako dɔɔ nɛ.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: Mɔna mɔɔ ne gyae nyi maa ŋere neŋ nyi nya kyɔ maŋ ya, mɛɛ gyae bo nyi nya kyɔ maŋ lee nyaŋ gbagba n konɔɔ man. Mena dɔɔ nyi n te sɛɛ ya na mɔɔ gyae maa yɛɛ kolo ya.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever.
local: Mberem na Onesimuse wɔŋa ɔ wose bo lee n gyaŋ debaŋ kyomii na ke yela waa nyiŋ kaa bese n wui kekpaakekpaa.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: Nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ ta tekaa ɔ yɛɛ n gbeŋi e kaageŋ ya, ɔ kela gbeŋi. Ɔ yɛɛ de naabu gyaagyi e. Mɛɛ gyae ɔ nombia nideli te ma gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ ne gyae ɔ nombia nideli gba kela maŋ. Nawolo nyi ɔ yɛɛ n gbeŋi e te ɔ besewɔ ɔ yɛɛ n naabu e de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu dɔɔ.

eng: So, if you really consider me a partner, welcome Onesimus as if you were welcoming me.
local: Mena dɔɔ nyi akpaa n gyeŋ nyi me yɛɛ n dɔɔ e na, lɛɛ e do ŋgba mena keŋ nyaŋ ke lɛɛ maŋ do nɛ.

eng: If he has harmed you in any way or owes you money, charge it to my account.
local: Nyi akpaa ɔ te yɛɛ neŋ nombiikum daale, yaa ɔ dana neŋ kolo kom na mo ke nyi maŋ danaana neŋ kom nɛ.
